verses.esv: The proverbs of Solomon, son of David, king of Israel:
verses.kjv: THE proverbs of Solomon the son of David, king of Israel;
verses.bsb: These are the proverbs of Solomon son of David, king of Israel,

verses.esv: To know wisdom and instruction, to understand words of insight,
verses.kjv: To know wisdom and instruction; to perceive the words of understanding;
verses.bsb: for gaining wisdom and discipline, for comprehending words of insight,

verses.esv: to receive instruction in wise dealing, in righteousness, justice, and equity;
verses.kjv: To receive the instruction of wisdom, justice, and judgment, and equity;
verses.bsb: and for receiving instruction in wise living and in righteousness, justice, and equity.

verses.esv: to give prudence to the simple, knowledge and discretion to the youth—
verses.kjv: To give subtilty to the simple, to the young man knowledge and discretion.
verses.bsb: To impart prudence to the simple and knowledge and discretion to the young,

verses.esv: Let the wise hear and increase in learning, and the one who understands obtain guidance,
verses.kjv: A wise man will hear, and will increase learning; and a man of understanding shall attain unto wise counsels:
verses.bsb: let the wise listen and gain instruction, and the discerning acquire wise counsel

verses.esv: to understand a proverb and a saying, the words of the wise and their riddles.
verses.kjv: To understand a proverb, and the interpretation; the words of the wise, and their dark sayings.
verses.bsb: by understanding the proverbs and parables, the sayings and riddles of the wise.

verses.esv: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of knowledge; fools despise wisdom and instruction.
verses.kjv: ¶ The fear of the Lord is the beginning of knowledge: but fools despise wisdom and instruction.
verses.bsb: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of knowledge, but fools despise wisdom and discipline.

verses.esv: Hear, my son, your father's instruction, and forsake not your mother's teaching,
verses.kjv: My son, hear the instruction of thy father, and forsake not the law of thy mother:
verses.bsb: Listen, my son, to your father’s instruction, and do not forsake the teaching of your mother.

verses.esv: for they are a graceful garland for your head and pendants for your neck.
verses.kjv: For they shall be an ornament of grace unto thy head, and chains about thy neck.
verses.bsb: For they are a garland of grace on your head and a pendant around your neck.

verses.esv: My son, if sinners entice you, do not consent.
verses.kjv: ¶ My son, if sinners entice thee, consent thou not.
verses.bsb: My son, if sinners entice you, do not yield to them.

verses.esv: If they say, “Come with us, let us lie in wait for blood; let us ambush the innocent without reason;
verses.kjv: If they say, Come with us, let us lay wait for blood, let us lurk privily for the innocent without cause:
verses.bsb: If they say, “Come along, let us lie in wait for blood, let us ambush the innocent without cause,

verses.esv: like Sheol let us swallow them alive, and whole, like those who go down to the pit;
verses.kjv: Let us swallow them up alive as the grave; and whole, as those that go down into the pit:
verses.bsb: let us swallow them alive like Sheol, and whole like those descending into the Pit.

verses.esv: we shall find all precious goods, we shall fill our houses with plunder;
verses.kjv: We shall find all precious substance, we shall fill our houses with spoil:
verses.bsb: We will find all manner of precious goods; we will fill our houses with plunder.

verses.esv: throw in your lot among us; we will all have one purse”—
verses.kjv: Cast in thy lot among us; let us all have one purse:
verses.bsb: Throw in your lot with us; let us all share one purse”—

verses.esv: my son, do not walk in the way with them; hold back your foot from their paths,
verses.kjv: My son, walk not thou in the way with them; refrain thy foot from their path:
verses.bsb: my son, do not walk the road with them or set foot upon their path.

verses.esv: for their feet run to evil, and they make haste to shed blood.
verses.kjv: For their feet run to evil, and make haste to shed blood.
verses.bsb: For their feet run to evil, and they are swift to shed blood.

verses.esv: For in vain is a net spread in the sight of any bird,
verses.kjv: Surely in vain the net is spread in the sight of any bird.
verses.bsb: How futile it is to spread the net where any bird can see it!

verses.esv: but these men lie in wait for their own blood; they set an ambush for their own lives.
verses.kjv: And they lay wait for their own blood; they lurk privily for their own lives.
verses.bsb: But they lie in wait for their own blood; they ambush their own lives.

verses.esv: Such are the ways of everyone who is greedy for unjust gain; it takes away the life of its possessors.
verses.kjv: So are the ways of every one that is greedy of gain; which taketh away the life of the owners thereof.
verses.bsb: Such is the fate of all who are greedy, whose unjust gain takes the lives of its possessors.

verses.esv: Wisdom cries aloud in the street, in the markets she raises her voice;
verses.kjv: ¶ Wisdom crieth without; she uttereth her voice in the streets:
verses.bsb: Wisdom calls out in the street, she lifts her voice in the square;

verses.esv: at the head of the noisy streets she cries out; at the entrance of the city gates she speaks:
verses.kjv: She crieth in the chief place of concourse, in the openings of the gates: in the city she uttereth her words, saying,
verses.bsb: in the main concourse she cries aloud, at the city gates she makes her speech:

verses.esv: “How long, O simple ones, will you love being simple? How long will scoffers delight in their scoffing and fools hate knowledge?
verses.kjv: How long, ye simple ones, will ye love simplicity? and the scorners delight in their scorning, and fools hate knowledge?
verses.bsb: “How long, O simple ones, will you love your simple ways? How long will scoffers delight in their scorn and fools hate knowledge?

verses.esv: If you turn at my reproof, behold, I will pour out my spirit to you; I will make my words known to you.
verses.kjv: Turn you at my reproof: behold, I will pour out my spirit unto you, I will make known my words unto you.
verses.bsb: If you had repented at my rebuke, then surely I would have poured out my spirit on you; I would have made my words known to you.

verses.esv: Because I have called and you refused to listen, have stretched out my hand and no one has heeded,
verses.kjv: ¶ Because I have called, and ye refused; I have stretched out my hand, and no man regarded;
verses.bsb: Because you refused my call, and no one took my outstretched hand,

verses.esv: because you have ignored all my counsel and would have none of my reproof,
verses.kjv: But ye have set at nought all my counsel, and would none of my reproof:
verses.bsb: because you neglected all my counsel, and wanted none of my correction,

verses.esv: I also will laugh at your calamity; I will mock when terror strikes you,
verses.kjv: I also will laugh at your calamity; I will mock when your fear cometh;
verses.bsb: in turn I will mock your calamity; I will sneer when terror strikes you,

verses.esv: when terror strikes you like a storm and your calamity comes like a whirlwind, when distress and anguish come upon you.
verses.kjv: When your fear cometh as desolation, and your destruction cometh as a whirlwind; when distress and anguish cometh upon you.
verses.bsb: when your dread comes like a storm, and your destruction like a whirlwind, when distress and anguish overwhelm you.

verses.esv: Then they will call upon me, but I will not answer; they will seek me diligently but will not find me.
verses.kjv: Then shall they call upon me, but I will not answer; they shall seek me early, but they shall not find me:
verses.bsb: Then they will call on me, but I will not answer; they will earnestly seek me, but will not find me.

verses.esv: Because they hated knowledge and did not choose the fear of the LORD,
verses.kjv: For that they hated knowledge, and did not choose the fear of the Lord:
verses.bsb: For they hated knowledge and chose not to fear the LORD.

verses.esv: would have none of my counsel and despised all my reproof,
verses.kjv: They would none of my counsel: they despised all my reproof.
verses.bsb: They accepted none of my counsel; they despised all my reproof.

verses.esv: therefore they shall eat the fruit of their way, and have their fill of their own devices.
verses.kjv: Therefore shall they eat of the fruit of their own way, and be filled with their own devices.
verses.bsb: So they will eat the fruit of their own way, and be filled with their own devices.

verses.esv: For the simple are killed by their turning away, and the complacency of fools destroys them;
verses.kjv: For the turning away of the simple shall slay them, and the prosperity of fools shall destroy them.
verses.bsb: For the waywardness of the simple will slay them, and the complacency of fools will destroy them.

verses.esv: but whoever listens to me will dwell secure and will be at ease, without dread of disaster.”
verses.kjv: But whoso hearkeneth unto me shall dwell safely, and shall be quiet from fear of evil.
verses.bsb: But whoever listens to me will dwell in safety, secure from the fear of evil.”

verses.esv: My son, if you receive my words and treasure up my commandments with you,
verses.kjv: MY son, if thou wilt receive my words, and hide my commandments with thee;
verses.bsb: My son, if you accept my words and hide my commandments within you,

verses.esv: making your ear attentive to wisdom and inclining your heart to understanding;
verses.kjv: So that thou incline thine ear unto wisdom, and apply thine heart to understanding;
verses.bsb: if you incline your ear to wisdom and direct your heart to understanding,

verses.esv: yes, if you call out for insight and raise your voice for understanding,
verses.kjv: Yea, if thou criest after knowledge, and liftest up thy voice for understanding;
verses.bsb: if you truly call out to insight and lift your voice to understanding,

verses.esv: if you seek it like silver and search for it as for hidden treasures,
verses.kjv: If thou seekest her as silver, and searchest for her as for hid treasures;
verses.bsb: if you seek it like silver and search it out like hidden treasure,

verses.esv: then you will understand the fear of the LORD and find the knowledge of God.
verses.kjv: Then shalt thou understand the fear of the Lord, and find the knowledge of God.
verses.bsb: then you will discern the fear of the LORD and discover the knowledge of God.

verses.esv: For the LORD gives wisdom; from his mouth come knowledge and understanding;
verses.kjv: For the Lord giveth wisdom: out of his mouth cometh knowledge and understanding.
verses.bsb: For the LORD gives wisdom; from His mouth come knowledge and understanding.

verses.esv: he stores up sound wisdom for the upright; he is a shield to those who walk in integrity,
verses.kjv: He layeth up sound wisdom for the righteous: he is a buckler to them that walk uprightly.
verses.bsb: He stores up sound wisdom for the upright; He is a shield to those who walk with integrity,

verses.esv: guarding the paths of justice and watching over the way of his saints.
verses.kjv: He keepeth the paths of judgment, and preserveth the way of his saints.
verses.bsb: to guard the paths of justice and protect the way of His saints.

verses.esv: Then you will understand righteousness and justice and equity, every good path;
verses.kjv: Then shalt thou understand righteousness, and judgment, and equity; yea, every good path.
verses.bsb: Then you will discern righteousness and justice and equity—every good path.

verses.esv: for wisdom will come into your heart, and knowledge will be pleasant to your soul;
verses.kjv: ¶ When wisdom entereth into thine heart, and knowledge is pleasant unto thy soul;
verses.bsb: For wisdom will enter your heart, and knowledge will delight your soul.

verses.esv: discretion will watch over you, understanding will guard you,
verses.kjv: Discretion shall preserve thee, understanding shall keep thee:
verses.bsb: Discretion will watch over you, and understanding will guard you,

verses.esv: delivering you from the way of evil, from men of perverted speech,
verses.kjv: To deliver thee from the way of the evil man, from the man that speaketh froward things;
verses.bsb: to deliver you from the way of evil, from the man who speaks perversity,

verses.esv: who forsake the paths of uprightness to walk in the ways of darkness,
verses.kjv: Who leave the paths of uprightness, to walk in the ways of darkness;
verses.bsb: from those who leave the straight paths to walk in the ways of darkness,

verses.esv: who rejoice in doing evil and delight in the perverseness of evil,
verses.kjv: Who rejoice to do evil, and delight in the frowardness of the wicked;
verses.bsb: from those who enjoy doing evil and rejoice in the twistedness of evil,

verses.esv: men whose paths are crooked, and who are devious in their ways.
verses.kjv: Whose ways are crooked, and they froward in their paths:
verses.bsb: whose paths are crooked and whose ways are devious.

verses.esv: So you will be delivered from the forbidden woman, from the adulteress with her smooth words,
verses.kjv: To deliver thee from the strange woman, even from the stranger which flattereth with her words;
verses.bsb: It will rescue you from the forbidden woman, from the stranger with seductive words

verses.esv: who forsakes the companion of her youth and forgets the covenant of her God;
verses.kjv: Which forsaketh the guide of her youth, and forgetteth the covenant of her God.
verses.bsb: who abandons the partner of her youth and forgets the covenant of her God.

verses.esv: for her house sinks down to death, and her paths to the departed;
verses.kjv: For her house inclineth unto death, and her paths unto the dead.
verses.bsb: For her house sinks down to death, and her tracks to the departed spirits.

verses.esv: none who go to her come back, nor do they regain the paths of life.
verses.kjv: None that go unto her return again, neither take they hold of the paths of life.
verses.bsb: None who go to her return or negotiate the paths of life.

verses.esv: So you will walk in the way of the good and keep to the paths of the righteous.
verses.kjv: That thou mayest walk in the way of good men, and keep the paths of the righteous.
verses.bsb: So you will follow in the ways of the good, and keep to the paths of the righteous.

verses.esv: For the upright will inhabit the land, and those with integrity will remain in it,
verses.kjv: For the upright shall dwell in the land, and the perfect shall remain in it.
verses.bsb: For the upright will inhabit the land, and the blameless will remain in it;

verses.esv: but the wicked will be cut off from the land, and the treacherous will be rooted out of it.
verses.kjv: But the wicked shall be cut off from the earth, and the transgressors shall be rooted out of it.
verses.bsb: but the wicked will be cut off from the land, and the unfaithful will be uprooted.

verses.esv: My son, do not forget my teaching, but let your heart keep my commandments,
verses.kjv: MY son, forget not my law; but let thine heart keep my commandments:
verses.bsb: My son, do not forget my teaching, but let your heart keep my commandments;

verses.esv: for length of days and years of life and peace they will add to you.
verses.kjv: For length of days, and long life, and peace, shall they add to thee.
verses.bsb: for they will add length to your days, years and peace to your life.

verses.esv: Let not steadfast love and faithfulness forsake you; bind them around your neck; write them on the tablet of your heart.
verses.kjv: Let not mercy and truth forsake thee: bind them about thy neck; write them upon the table of thine heart:
verses.bsb: Never let loving devotion or faithfulness leave you; bind them around your neck, write them on the tablet of your heart.

verses.esv: So you will find favor and good success in the sight of God and man.
verses.kjv: So shalt thou find favour and good understanding in the sight of God and man.
verses.bsb: Then you will find favor and high regard in the sight of God and man.

verses.esv: Trust in the LORD with all your heart, and do not lean on your own understanding.
verses.kjv: ¶ Trust in the Lord with all thine heart; and lean not unto thine own understanding.
verses.bsb: Trust in the LORD with all your heart, and lean not on your own understanding;

verses.esv: In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make straight your paths.
verses.kjv: In all thy ways acknowledge him, and he shall direct thy paths.
verses.bsb: in all your ways acknowledge Him, and He will make your paths straight.

verses.esv: Be not wise in your own eyes; fear the LORD, and turn away from evil.
verses.kjv: ¶ Be not wise in thine own eyes: fear the Lord, and depart from evil.
verses.bsb: Be not wise in your own eyes; fear the LORD and turn away from evil.

verses.esv: It will be healing to your flesh and refreshment to your bones.
verses.kjv: It shall be health to thy navel, and marrow to thy bones.
verses.bsb: This will bring healing to your body and refreshment to your bones.

verses.esv: Honor the LORD with your wealth and with the firstfruits of all your produce;
verses.kjv: Honour the Lord with thy substance, and with the firstfruits of all thine increase:
verses.bsb: Honor the LORD with your wealth and with the firstfruits of all your harvest;

verses.esv: then your barns will be filled with plenty, and your vats will be bursting with wine.
verses.kjv: So shall thy barns be filled with plenty, and thy presses shall burst out with new wine.
verses.bsb: then your barns will be filled with plenty, and your vats will overflow with new wine.

verses.esv: My son, do not despise the LORD's discipline or be weary of his reproof,
verses.kjv: ¶ My son, despise not the chastening of the Lord; neither be weary of his correction:
verses.bsb: My son, do not reject the discipline of the LORD, and do not loathe His rebuke;

verses.esv: for the LORD reproves him whom he loves, as a father the son in whom he delights.
verses.kjv: For whom the Lord loveth he correcteth; even as a father the son in whom he delighteth.
verses.bsb: for the LORD disciplines the one He loves, as does a father the son in whom he delights.

verses.esv: Blessed is the one who finds wisdom, and the one who gets understanding,
verses.kjv: ¶ Happy is the man that findeth wisdom, and the man that getteth understanding.
verses.bsb: Blessed is the man who finds wisdom, the man who acquires understanding,

verses.esv: for the gain from her is better than gain from silver and her profit better than gold.
verses.kjv: For the merchandise of it is better than the merchandise of silver, and the gain thereof than fine gold.
verses.bsb: for she is more profitable than silver, and her gain is better than fine gold.

verses.esv: She is more precious than jewels, and nothing you desire can compare with her.
verses.kjv: She is more precious than rubies: and all the things thou canst desire are not to be compared unto her.
verses.bsb: She is more precious than rubies; nothing you desire compares with her.

verses.esv: Long life is in her right hand; in her left hand are riches and honor.
verses.kjv: Length of days is in her right hand; and in her left hand riches and honour.
verses.bsb: Long life is in her right hand; in her left hand are riches and honor.

verses.esv: Her ways are ways of pleasantness, and all her paths are peace.
verses.kjv: Her ways are ways of pleasantness, and all her paths are peace.
verses.bsb: All her ways are pleasant, and all her paths are peaceful.

verses.esv: She is a tree of life to those who lay hold of her; those who hold her fast are called blessed.
verses.kjv: She is a tree of life to them that lay hold upon her: and happy is every one that retaineth her.
verses.bsb: She is a tree of life to those who embrace her, and those who lay hold of her are blessed.

verses.esv: The LORD by wisdom founded the earth; by understanding he established the heavens;
verses.kjv: The Lord by wisdom hath founded the earth; by understanding hath he established the heavens.
verses.bsb: The LORD founded the earth by wisdom and established the heavens by understanding.

verses.esv: by his knowledge the deeps broke open, and the clouds drop down the dew.
verses.kjv: By his knowledge the depths are broken up, and the clouds drop down the dew.
verses.bsb: By His knowledge the watery depths were broken open, and the clouds dripped with dew.

verses.esv: My son, do not lose sight of these— keep sound wisdom and discretion,
verses.kjv: ¶ My son, let not them depart from thine eyes: keep sound wisdom and discretion:
verses.bsb: My son, do not lose sight of this: Preserve sound judgment and discernment.

verses.esv: and they will be life for your soul and adornment for your neck.
verses.kjv: So shall they be life unto thy soul, and grace to thy neck.
verses.bsb: They will be life to your soul and adornment to your neck.

verses.esv: Then you will walk on your way securely, and your foot will not stumble.
verses.kjv: Then shalt thou walk in thy way safely, and thy foot shall not stumble.
verses.bsb: Then you will go on your way in safety, and your foot will not stumble.

verses.esv: If you lie down, you will not be afraid; when you lie down, your sleep will be sweet.
verses.kjv: When thou liest down, thou shalt not be afraid: yea, thou shalt lie down, and thy sleep shall be sweet.
verses.bsb: When you lie down, you will not be afraid; when you rest, your sleep will be sweet.

verses.esv: Do not be afraid of sudden terror or of the ruin of the wicked, when it comes,
verses.kjv: Be not afraid of sudden fear, neither of the desolation of the wicked, when it cometh.
verses.bsb: Do not fear sudden danger or the ruin that overtakes the wicked,

verses.esv: for the LORD will be your confidence and will keep your foot from being caught.
verses.kjv: For the Lord shall be thy confidence, and shall keep thy foot from being taken.
verses.bsb: for the LORD will be your confidence and will keep your foot from the snare.

verses.esv: Do not withhold good from those to whom it is due, when it is in your power to do it.
verses.kjv: ¶ Withhold not good from them to whom it is due, when it is in the power of thine hand to do it.
verses.bsb: Do not withhold good from the deserving when it is within your power to act.

verses.esv: Do not say to your neighbor, “Go, and come again, tomorrow I will give it”—when you have it with you.
verses.kjv: Say not unto thy neighbour, Go, and come again, and to morrow I will give; when thou hast it by thee.
verses.bsb: Do not tell your neighbor, “Come back tomorrow and I will provide”— when you already have the means.

verses.esv: Do not plan evil against your neighbor, who dwells trustingly beside you.
verses.kjv: Devise not evil against thy neighbour, seeing he dwelleth securely by thee.
verses.bsb: Do not devise evil against your neighbor, for he trustfully dwells beside you.

verses.esv: Do not contend with a man for no reason, when he has done you no harm.
verses.kjv: ¶ Strive not with a man without cause, if he have done thee no harm.
verses.bsb: Do not accuse a man without cause, when he has done you no harm.

verses.esv: Do not envy a man of violence and do not choose any of his ways,
verses.kjv: ¶ Envy thou not the oppressor, and choose none of his ways.
verses.bsb: Do not envy a violent man or choose any of his ways;

verses.esv: for the devious person is an abomination to the LORD, but the upright are in his confidence.
verses.kjv: For the froward is abomination to the Lord: but his secret is with the righteous.
verses.bsb: for the LORD detests the perverse, but He is a friend to the upright.

verses.esv: The LORD's curse is on the house of the wicked, but he blesses the dwelling of the righteous.
verses.kjv: ¶ The curse of the Lord is in the house of the wicked: but he blesseth the habitation of the just.
verses.bsb: The curse of the LORD is on the house of the wicked, but He blesses the home of the righteous.

verses.esv: Toward the scorners he is scornful, but to the humble he gives favor.
verses.kjv: Surely he scorneth the scorners: but he giveth grace unto the lowly.
verses.bsb: He mocks the mockers, but gives grace to the humble.

verses.esv: The wise will inherit honor, but fools get disgrace.
verses.kjv: The wise shall inherit glory: but shame shall be the promotion of fools.
verses.bsb: The wise will inherit honor, but fools are held up to shame.

verses.esv: Hear, O sons, a father's instruction, and be attentive, that you may gain insight,
verses.kjv: HEAR, ye children, the instruction of a father, and attend to know understanding.
verses.bsb: Listen, my sons, to a father’s instruction; pay attention and gain understanding.

verses.esv: for I give you good precepts; do not forsake my teaching.
verses.kjv: For I give you good doctrine, forsake ye not my law.
verses.bsb: For I give you sound teaching; do not abandon my directive.

verses.esv: When I was a son with my father, tender, the only one in the sight of my mother,
verses.kjv: For I was my father’s son, tender and only beloved in the sight of my mother.
verses.bsb: When I was a son to my father, tender and the only child of my mother,

verses.esv: he taught me and said to me, “Let your heart hold fast my words; keep my commandments, and live.
verses.kjv: He taught me also, and said unto me, Let thine heart retain my words: keep my commandments, and live.
verses.bsb: he taught me and said, “Let your heart lay hold of my words; keep my commands and you will live.

verses.esv: Get wisdom; get insight; do not forget, and do not turn away from the words of my mouth.
verses.kjv: Get wisdom, get understanding: forget it not; neither decline from the words of my mouth.
verses.bsb: Get wisdom, get understanding; do not forget my words or turn from them.

verses.esv: Do not forsake her, and she will keep you; love her, and she will guard you.
verses.kjv: Forsake her not, and she shall preserve thee: love her, and she shall keep thee.
verses.bsb: Do not forsake wisdom, and she will preserve you; love her, and she will guard you.

verses.esv: The beginning of wisdom is this: Get wisdom, and whatever you get, get insight.
verses.kjv: Wisdom is the principal thing; therefore get wisdom: and with all thy getting get understanding.
verses.bsb: Wisdom is supreme; so acquire wisdom. And whatever you may acquire, gain understanding.

verses.esv: Prize her highly, and she will exalt you; she will honor you if you embrace her.
verses.kjv: Exalt her, and she shall promote thee: she shall bring thee to honour, when thou dost embrace her.
verses.bsb: Prize her, and she will exalt you; if you embrace her, she will honor you.

verses.esv: She will place on your head a graceful garland; she will bestow on you a beautiful crown.”
verses.kjv: She shall give to thine head an ornament of grace: a crown of glory shall she deliver to thee.
verses.bsb: She will set a garland of grace on your head; she will present you with a crown of beauty.”

verses.esv: Hear, my son, and accept my words, that the years of your life may be many.
verses.kjv: Hear, O my son, and receive my sayings; and the years of thy life shall be many.
verses.bsb: Listen, my son, and receive my words, and the years of your life will be many.

verses.esv: I have taught you the way of wisdom; I have led you in the paths of uprightness.
verses.kjv: I have taught thee in the way of wisdom; I have led thee in right paths.
verses.bsb: I will guide you in the way of wisdom; I will lead you on straight paths.

verses.esv: When you walk, your step will not be hampered, and if you run, you will not stumble.
verses.kjv: When thou goest, thy steps shall not be straitened; and when thou runnest, thou shalt not stumble.
verses.bsb: When you walk, your steps will not be impeded; when you run, you will not stumble.

verses.esv: Keep hold of instruction; do not let go; guard her, for she is your life.
verses.kjv: Take fast hold of instruction; let her not go: keep her; for she is thy life.
verses.bsb: Hold on to instruction; do not let go. Guard it, for it is your life.

verses.esv: Do not enter the path of the wicked, and do not walk in the way of the evil.
verses.kjv: ¶ Enter not into the path of the wicked, and go not in the way of evil men.
verses.bsb: Do not set foot on the path of the wicked or walk in the way of evildoers.

verses.esv: Avoid it; do not go on it; turn away from it and pass on.
verses.kjv: Avoid it, pass not by it, turn from it, and pass away.
verses.bsb: Avoid it; do not travel on it. Turn from it and pass on by.

verses.esv: For they cannot sleep unless they have done wrong; they are robbed of sleep unless they have made someone stumble.
verses.kjv: For they sleep not, except they have done mischief; and their sleep is taken away, unless they cause some to fall.
verses.bsb: For they cannot sleep unless they do evil; they are deprived of slumber until they make someone fall.

verses.esv: For they eat the bread of wickedness and drink the wine of violence.
verses.kjv: For they eat the bread of wickedness, and drink the wine of violence.
verses.bsb: For they eat the bread of wickedness and drink the wine of violence.

verses.esv: But the path of the righteous is like the light of dawn, which shines brighter and brighter until full day.
verses.kjv: But the path of the just is as the shining light, that shineth more and more unto the perfect day.
verses.bsb: The path of the righteous is like the first gleam of dawn, shining brighter and brighter until midday.

verses.esv: The way of the wicked is like deep darkness; they do not know over what they stumble.
verses.kjv: The way of the wicked is as darkness: they know not at what they stumble.
verses.bsb: But the way of the wicked is like the darkest gloom; they do not know what makes them stumble.

verses.esv: My son, be attentive to my words; incline your ear to my sayings.
verses.kjv: ¶ My son, attend to my words; incline thine ear unto my sayings.
verses.bsb: My son, pay attention to my words; incline your ear to my sayings.

verses.esv: Let them not escape from your sight; keep them within your heart.
verses.kjv: Let them not depart from thine eyes; keep them in the midst of thine heart.
verses.bsb: Do not lose sight of them; keep them within your heart.

verses.esv: For they are life to those who find them, and healing to all their flesh.
verses.kjv: For they are life unto those that find them, and health to all their flesh.
verses.bsb: For they are life to those who find them, and health to the whole body.

verses.esv: Keep your heart with all vigilance, for from it flow the springs of life.
verses.kjv: ¶ Keep thy heart with all diligence; for out of it are the issues of life.
verses.bsb: Guard your heart with all diligence, for from it flow springs of life.

verses.esv: Put away from you crooked speech, and put devious talk far from you.
verses.kjv: Put away from thee a froward mouth, and perverse lips put far from thee.
verses.bsb: Put away deception from your mouth; keep your lips from perverse speech.

verses.esv: Let your eyes look directly forward, and your gaze be straight before you.
verses.kjv: Let thine eyes look right on, and let thine eyelids look straight before thee.
verses.bsb: Let your eyes look forward; fix your gaze straight ahead.

verses.esv: Ponder the path of your feet; then all your ways will be sure.
verses.kjv: Ponder the path of thy feet, and let all thy ways be established.
verses.bsb: Make a level path for your feet, and all your ways will be sure.

verses.esv: Do not swerve to the right or to the left; turn your foot away from evil.
verses.kjv: Turn not to the right hand nor to the left: remove thy foot from evil.
verses.bsb: Do not swerve to the right or to the left; turn your feet away from evil.

verses.esv: My son, be attentive to my wisdom; incline your ear to my understanding,
verses.kjv: MY son, attend unto my wisdom, and bow thine ear to my understanding:
verses.bsb: My son, pay attention to my wisdom; incline your ear to my insight,

verses.esv: that you may keep discretion, and your lips may guard knowledge.
verses.kjv: That thou mayest regard discretion, and that thy lips may keep knowledge.
verses.bsb: that you may maintain discretion and your lips may preserve knowledge.

verses.esv: For the lips of a forbidden woman drip honey, and her speech is smoother than oil,
verses.kjv: ¶ For the lips of a strange woman drop as an honeycomb, and her mouth is smoother than oil:
verses.bsb: Though the lips of the forbidden woman drip honey and her speech is smoother than oil,

verses.esv: but in the end she is bitter as wormwood, sharp as a two-edged sword.
verses.kjv: But her end is bitter as wormwood, sharp as a twoedged sword.
verses.bsb: in the end she is bitter as wormwood, sharp as a double-edged sword.

verses.esv: Her feet go down to death; her steps follow the path to Sheol;
verses.kjv: Her feet go down to death; her steps take hold on hell.
verses.bsb: Her feet go down to death; her steps lead straight to Sheol.

verses.esv: she does not ponder the path of life; her ways wander, and she does not know it.
verses.kjv: Lest thou shouldest ponder the path of life, her ways are moveable, that thou canst not know them.
verses.bsb: She does not consider the path of life; she does not know that her ways are unstable.

verses.esv: And now, O sons, listen to me, and do not depart from the words of my mouth.
verses.kjv: Hear me now therefore, O ye children, and depart not from the words of my mouth.
verses.bsb: So now, my sons, listen to me, and do not turn aside from the words of my mouth.

verses.esv: Keep your way far from her, and do not go near the door of her house,
verses.kjv: Remove thy way far from her, and come not nigh the door of her house:
verses.bsb: Keep your path far from her; do not go near the door of her house,

verses.esv: lest you give your honor to others and your years to the merciless,
verses.kjv: Lest thou give thine honour unto others, and thy years unto the cruel:
verses.bsb: lest you concede your vigor to others, and your years to one who is cruel;

verses.esv: lest strangers take their fill of your strength, and your labors go to the house of a foreigner,
verses.kjv: Lest strangers be filled with thy wealth; and thy labours be in the house of a stranger;
verses.bsb: lest strangers feast on your wealth, and your labors enrich the house of a foreigner.

verses.esv: and at the end of your life you groan, when your flesh and body are consumed,
verses.kjv: And thou mourn at the last, when thy flesh and thy body are consumed,
verses.bsb: At the end of your life you will groan when your flesh and your body are spent,

verses.esv: and you say, “How I hated discipline, and my heart despised reproof!
verses.kjv: And say, How have I hated instruction, and my heart despised reproof;
verses.bsb: and you will say, “How I hated discipline, and my heart despised reproof!

verses.esv: I did not listen to the voice of my teachers or incline my ear to my instructors.
verses.kjv: And have not obeyed the voice of my teachers, nor inclined mine ear to them that instructed me!
verses.bsb: I did not listen to the voice of my teachers or incline my ear to my mentors.

verses.esv: I am at the brink of utter ruin in the assembled congregation.”
verses.kjv: I was almost in all evil in the midst of the congregation and assembly.
verses.bsb: I am on the brink of utter ruin in the midst of the whole assembly.”

verses.esv: Drink water from your own cistern, flowing water from your own well.
verses.kjv: ¶ Drink waters out of thine own cistern, and running waters out of thine own well.
verses.bsb: Drink water from your own cistern, and running water from your own well.

verses.esv: Should your springs be scattered abroad, streams of water in the streets?
verses.kjv: Let thy fountains be dispersed abroad, and rivers of waters in the streets.
verses.bsb: Why should your springs flow in the streets, your streams of water in the public squares?

verses.esv: Let them be for yourself alone, and not for strangers with you.
verses.kjv: Let them be only thine own, and not strangers’ with thee.
verses.bsb: Let them be yours alone, never to be shared with strangers.

verses.esv: Let your fountain be blessed, and rejoice in the wife of your youth,
verses.kjv: Let thy fountain be blessed: and rejoice with the wife of thy youth.
verses.bsb: May your fountain be blessed, and may you rejoice in the wife of your youth:

verses.esv: a lovely deer, a graceful doe. Let her breasts fill you at all times with delight; be intoxicated always in her love.
verses.kjv: Let her be as the loving hind and pleasant roe; let her breasts satisfy thee at all times; and be thou ravished always with her love.
verses.bsb: A loving doe, a graceful fawn— may her breasts satisfy you always; may you be captivated by her love forever.

verses.esv: Why should you be intoxicated, my son, with a forbidden woman and embrace the bosom of an adulteress?
verses.kjv: And why wilt thou, my son, be ravished with a strange woman, and embrace the bosom of a stranger?
verses.bsb: Why be captivated, my son, by an adulteress, or embrace the bosom of a stranger?

verses.esv: For a man's ways are before the eyes of the LORD, and he ponders all his paths.
verses.kjv: For the ways of man are before the eyes of the Lord, and he pondereth all his goings.
verses.bsb: For a man’s ways are before the eyes of the LORD, and the LORD examines all his paths.

verses.esv: The iniquities of the wicked ensnare him, and he is held fast in the cords of his sin.
verses.kjv: ¶ His own iniquities shall take the wicked himself, and he shall be holden with the cords of his sins.
verses.bsb: The iniquities of a wicked man entrap him; the cords of his sin entangle him.

verses.esv: He dies for lack of discipline, and because of his great folly he is led astray.
verses.kjv: He shall die without instruction; and in the greatness of his folly he shall go astray.
verses.bsb: He dies for lack of discipline, led astray by his own great folly.

verses.esv: My son, if you have put up security for your neighbor, have given your pledge for a stranger,
verses.kjv: MY son, if thou be surety for thy friend, if thou hast stricken thy hand with a stranger,
verses.bsb: My son, if you have put up security for your neighbor, if you have struck hands in pledge with a stranger,

verses.esv: if you are snared in the words of your mouth, caught in the words of your mouth,
verses.kjv: Thou art snared with the words of thy mouth, thou art taken with the words of thy mouth.
verses.bsb: if you have been trapped by the words of your lips, ensnared by the words of your mouth,

verses.esv: then do this, my son, and save yourself, for you have come into the hand of your neighbor: go, hasten, and plead urgently with your neighbor.
verses.kjv: Do this now, my son, and deliver thyself, when thou art come into the hand of thy friend; go, humble thyself, and make sure thy friend.
verses.bsb: then do this, my son, to free yourself, for you have fallen into your neighbor’s hands: Go, humble yourself, and press your plea with your neighbor.

verses.esv: Give your eyes no sleep and your eyelids no slumber;
verses.kjv: Give not sleep to thine eyes, nor slumber to thine eyelids.
verses.bsb: Allow no sleep to your eyes or slumber to your eyelids.

verses.esv: save yourself like a gazelle from the hand of the hunter, like a bird from the hand of the fowler.
verses.kjv: Deliver thyself as a roe from the hand of the hunter, and as a bird from the hand of the fowler.
verses.bsb: Free yourself, like a gazelle from the hand of the hunter, like a bird from the snare of the fowler.

verses.esv: Go to the ant, O sluggard; consider her ways, and be wise.
verses.kjv: ¶ Go to the ant, thou sluggard; consider her ways, and be wise:
verses.bsb: Walk in the manner of the ant, O slacker; observe its ways and become wise.

verses.esv: Without having any chief, officer, or ruler,
verses.kjv: Which having no guide, overseer, or ruler,
verses.bsb: Without a commander, without an overseer or ruler,

verses.esv: she prepares her bread in summer and gathers her food in harvest.
verses.kjv: Provideth her meat in the summer, and gathereth her food in the harvest.
verses.bsb: it prepares its provisions in summer; it gathers its food at harvest.

verses.esv: How long will you lie there, O sluggard? When will you arise from your sleep?
verses.kjv: How long wilt thou sleep, O sluggard? when wilt thou arise out of thy sleep?
verses.bsb: How long will you lie there, O slacker? When will you get up from your sleep?

verses.esv: A little sleep, a little slumber, a little folding of the hands to rest,
verses.kjv: Yet a little sleep, a little slumber, a little folding of the hands to sleep:
verses.bsb: A little sleep, a little slumber, a little folding of the hands to rest,

verses.esv: and poverty will come upon you like a robber, and want like an armed man.
verses.kjv: So shall thy poverty come as one that travelleth, and thy want as an armed man.
verses.bsb: and poverty will come upon you like a robber, and need like a bandit.

verses.esv: A worthless person, a wicked man, goes about with crooked speech,
verses.kjv: ¶ A naughty person, a wicked man, walketh with a froward mouth.
verses.bsb: A worthless person, a wicked man, walks with a perverse mouth,

verses.esv: winks with his eyes, signals with his feet, points with his finger,
verses.kjv: He winketh with his eyes, he speaketh with his feet, he teacheth with his fingers;
verses.bsb: winking his eyes, speaking with his feet, and pointing with his fingers.

verses.esv: with perverted heart devises evil, continually sowing discord;
verses.kjv: Frowardness is in his heart, he deviseth mischief continually; he soweth discord.
verses.bsb: With deceit in his heart he devises evil; he continually sows discord.

verses.esv: therefore calamity will come upon him suddenly; in a moment he will be broken beyond healing.
verses.kjv: Therefore shall his calamity come suddenly; suddenly shall he be broken without remedy.
verses.bsb: Therefore calamity will come upon him suddenly; in an instant he will be shattered beyond recovery.

verses.esv: There are six things that the LORD hates, seven that are an abomination to him:
verses.kjv: ¶ These six things doth the Lord hate: yea, seven are an abomination unto him:
verses.bsb: There are six things that the LORD hates, seven that are detestable to Him:

verses.esv: haughty eyes, a lying tongue, and hands that shed innocent blood,
verses.kjv: A proud look, a lying tongue, and hands that shed innocent blood,
verses.bsb: haughty eyes,   a lying tongue,   hands that shed innocent blood,

verses.esv: a heart that devises wicked plans, feet that make haste to run to evil,
verses.kjv: An heart that deviseth wicked imaginations, feet that be swift in running to mischief,
verses.bsb: a heart that devises wicked schemes,   feet that run swiftly to evil,

verses.esv: a false witness who breathes out lies, and one who sows discord among brothers.
verses.kjv: A false witness that speaketh lies, and he that soweth discord among brethren.
verses.bsb: a false witness who gives false testimony,   and one who stirs up discord among brothers.

verses.esv: My son, keep your father's commandment, and forsake not your mother's teaching.
verses.kjv: ¶ My son, keep thy father’s commandment, and forsake not the law of thy mother:
verses.bsb: My son, keep your father’s commandment, and do not forsake your mother’s teaching.

verses.esv: Bind them on your heart always; tie them around your neck.
verses.kjv: Bind them continually upon thine heart, and tie them about thy neck.
verses.bsb: Bind them always upon your heart; tie them around your neck.

verses.esv: When you walk, they will lead you; when you lie down, they will watch over you; and when you awake, they will talk with you.
verses.kjv: When thou goest, it shall lead thee; when thou sleepest, it shall keep thee; and when thou awakest, it shall talk with thee.
verses.bsb: When you walk, they will guide you; when you lie down, they will watch over you; when you awake, they will speak to you.

verses.esv: For the commandment is a lamp and the teaching a light, and the reproofs of discipline are the way of life,
verses.kjv: For the commandment is a lamp; and the law is light; and reproofs of instruction are the way of life:
verses.bsb: For this commandment is a lamp, this teaching is a light, and the reproofs of discipline are the way to life,

verses.esv: to preserve you from the evil woman, from the smooth tongue of the adulteress.
verses.kjv: To keep thee from the evil woman, from the flattery of the tongue of a strange woman.
verses.bsb: to keep you from the evil woman, from the smooth tongue of the adulteress.

verses.esv: Do not desire her beauty in your heart, and do not let her capture you with her eyelashes;
verses.kjv: Lust not after her beauty in thine heart; neither let her take thee with her eyelids.
verses.bsb: Do not lust in your heart for her beauty or let her captivate you with her eyes.

verses.esv: for the price of a prostitute is only a loaf of bread, but a married woman hunts down a precious life.
verses.kjv: For by means of a whorish woman a man is brought to a piece of bread: and the adulteress will hunt for the precious life.
verses.bsb: For the levy of the prostitute is poverty, and the adulteress preys upon your very life.

verses.esv: Can a man carry fire next to his chest and his clothes not be burned?
verses.kjv: Can a man take fire in his bosom, and his clothes not be burned?
verses.bsb: Can a man embrace fire and his clothes not be burned?

verses.esv: Or can one walk on hot coals and his feet not be scorched?
verses.kjv: Can one go upon hot coals, and his feet not be burned?
verses.bsb: Can a man walk on hot coals without scorching his feet?

verses.esv: So is he who goes in to his neighbor's wife; none who touches her will go unpunished.
verses.kjv: So he that goeth in to his neighbour’s wife; whosoever toucheth her shall not be innocent.
verses.bsb: So is he who sleeps with another man’s wife; no one who touches her will go unpunished.

verses.esv: People do not despise a thief if he steals to satisfy his appetite when he is hungry,
verses.kjv: Men do not despise a thief, if he steal to satisfy his soul when he is hungry;
verses.bsb: Men do not despise the thief if he steals to satisfy his hunger.

verses.esv: but if he is caught, he will pay sevenfold; he will give all the goods of his house.
verses.kjv: But if he be found, he shall restore sevenfold; he shall give all the substance of his house.
verses.bsb: Yet if caught, he must pay sevenfold; he must give up all the wealth of his house.

verses.esv: He who commits adultery lacks sense; he who does it destroys himself.
verses.kjv: But whoso committeth adultery with a woman lacketh understanding: he that doeth it destroyeth his own soul.
verses.bsb: He who commits adultery lacks judgment; whoever does so destroys himself.

verses.esv: He will get wounds and dishonor, and his disgrace will not be wiped away.
verses.kjv: A wound and dishonour shall he get; and his reproach shall not be wiped away.
verses.bsb: Wounds and dishonor will befall him, and his reproach will never be wiped away.

verses.esv: For jealousy makes a man furious, and he will not spare when he takes revenge.
verses.kjv: For jealousy is the rage of a man: therefore he will not spare in the day of vengeance.
verses.bsb: For jealousy enrages a husband, and he will show no mercy in the day of vengeance.

verses.esv: He will accept no compensation; he will refuse though you multiply gifts.
verses.kjv: He will not regard any ransom; neither will he rest content, though thou givest many gifts.
verses.bsb: He will not be appeased by any ransom, or persuaded by lavish gifts.

verses.esv: My son, keep my words and treasure up my commandments with you;
verses.kjv: MY son, keep my words, and lay up my commandments with thee.
verses.bsb: My son, keep my words and treasure my commandments within you.

verses.esv: keep my commandments and live; keep my teaching as the apple of your eye;
verses.kjv: Keep my commandments, and live; and my law as the apple of thine eye.
verses.bsb: Keep my commandments and live; guard my teachings as the apple of your eye.

verses.esv: bind them on your fingers; write them on the tablet of your heart.
verses.kjv: Bind them upon thy fingers, write them upon the table of thine heart.
verses.bsb: Tie them to your fingers; write them on the tablet of your heart.

verses.esv: Say to wisdom, “You are my sister,” and call insight your intimate friend,
verses.kjv: Say unto wisdom, Thou art my sister; and call understanding thy kinswoman:
verses.bsb: Say to wisdom, “You are my sister,” and call understanding your kinsman,

verses.esv: to keep you from the forbidden woman, from the adulteress with her smooth words.
verses.kjv: That they may keep thee from the strange woman, from the stranger which flattereth with her words.
verses.bsb: that they may keep you from the adulteress, from the stranger with seductive words.

verses.esv: For at the window of my house I have looked out through my lattice,
verses.kjv: ¶ For at the window of my house I looked through my casement,
verses.bsb: For at the window of my house I looked through the lattice.

verses.esv: and I have seen among the simple, I have perceived among the youths, a young man lacking sense,
verses.kjv: And beheld among the simple ones, I discerned among the youths, a young man void of understanding,
verses.bsb: I saw among the simple, I noticed among the youths, a young man lacking judgment,

verses.esv: passing along the street near her corner, taking the road to her house
verses.kjv: Passing through the street near her corner; and he went the way to her house,
verses.bsb: crossing the street near her corner, strolling down the road to her house,

verses.esv: in the twilight, in the evening, at the time of night and darkness.
verses.kjv: In the twilight, in the evening, in the black and dark night:
verses.bsb: at twilight, as the day was fading into the dark of the night.

verses.esv: And behold, the woman meets him, dressed as a prostitute, wily of heart.
verses.kjv: And, behold, there met him a woman with the attire of an harlot, and subtil of heart.
verses.bsb: Then a woman came out to meet him, with the attire of a harlot and cunning of heart.

verses.esv: She is loud and wayward; her feet do not stay at home;
verses.kjv: (She is loud and stubborn; her feet abide not in her house:
verses.bsb: She is loud and defiant; her feet do not remain at home.

verses.esv: now in the street, now in the market, and at every corner she lies in wait.
verses.kjv: Now is she without, now in the streets, and lieth in wait at every corner.)
verses.bsb: Now in the street, now in the squares, she lurks at every corner.

verses.esv: She seizes him and kisses him, and with bold face she says to him,
verses.kjv: So she caught him, and kissed him, and with an impudent face said unto him,
verses.bsb: She seizes him and kisses him; she brazenly says to him:

verses.esv: “I had to offer sacrifices, and today I have paid my vows;
verses.kjv: I have peace offerings with me; this day have I payed my vows.
verses.bsb: “I have made my peace offerings; today I have paid my vows.

verses.esv: so now I have come out to meet you, to seek you eagerly, and I have found you.
verses.kjv: Therefore came I forth to meet thee, diligently to seek thy face, and I have found thee.
verses.bsb: So I came out to meet you; I sought you, and I have found you.

verses.esv: I have spread my couch with coverings, colored linens from Egyptian linen;
verses.kjv: I have decked my bed with coverings of tapestry, with carved works, with fine linen of Egypt.
verses.bsb: I have decked my bed with coverings, with colored linen from Egypt.

verses.esv: I have perfumed my bed with myrrh, aloes, and cinnamon.
verses.kjv: I have perfumed my bed with myrrh, aloes, and cinnamon.
verses.bsb: I have perfumed my bed with myrrh, with aloes, and with cinnamon.

verses.esv: Come, let us take our fill of love till morning; let us delight ourselves with love.
verses.kjv: Come, let us take our fill of love until the morning: let us solace ourselves with loves.
verses.bsb: Come, let us take our fill of love till morning. Let us delight in loving caresses!

verses.esv: For my husband is not at home; he has gone on a long journey;
verses.kjv: For the goodman is not at home, he is gone a long journey:
verses.bsb: For my husband is not at home; he has gone on a long journey.

verses.esv: he took a bag of money with him; at full moon he will come home.”
verses.kjv: He hath taken a bag of money with him, and will come home at the day appointed.
verses.bsb: He took with him a bag of money and will not return till the moon is full.”

verses.esv: With much seductive speech she persuades him; with her smooth talk she compels him.
verses.kjv: With her much fair speech she caused him to yield, with the flattering of her lips she forced him.
verses.bsb: With her great persuasion she entices him; with her flattering lips she lures him.

verses.esv: All at once he follows her, as an ox goes to the slaughter, or as a stag is caught fast
verses.kjv: He goeth after her straightway, as an ox goeth to the slaughter, or as a fool to the correction of the stocks;
verses.bsb: He follows her on impulse, like an ox going to the slaughter, like a deer bounding into a trap,

verses.esv: till an arrow pierces its liver; as a bird rushes into a snare; he does not know that it will cost him his life.
verses.kjv: Till a dart strike through his liver; as a bird hasteth to the snare, and knoweth not that it is for his life.
verses.bsb: until an arrow pierces his liver, like a bird darting into a snare— not knowing it will cost him his life.

verses.esv: And now, O sons, listen to me, and be attentive to the words of my mouth.
verses.kjv: ¶ Hearken unto me now therefore, O ye children, and attend to the words of my mouth.
verses.bsb: Now, my sons, listen to me, and attend to the words of my mouth.

verses.esv: Let not your heart turn aside to her ways; do not stray into her paths,
verses.kjv: Let not thine heart decline to her ways, go not astray in her paths.
verses.bsb: Do not let your heart turn aside to her ways; do not stray into her paths.

verses.esv: for many a victim has she laid low, and all her slain are a mighty throng.
verses.kjv: For she hath cast down many wounded: yea, many strong men have been slain by her.
verses.bsb: For she has brought many down to death; her slain are many in number.

verses.esv: Her house is the way to Sheol, going down to the chambers of death.
verses.kjv: Her house is the way to hell, going down to the chambers of death.
verses.bsb: Her house is the road to Sheol, descending to the chambers of death.

verses.esv: Does not wisdom call? Does not understanding raise her voice?
verses.kjv: DOTH not wisdom cry? and understanding put forth her voice?
verses.bsb: Does not wisdom call out, and understanding raise her voice?

verses.esv: On the heights beside the way, at the crossroads she takes her stand;
verses.kjv: She standeth in the top of high places, by the way in the places of the paths.
verses.bsb: On the heights overlooking the road, at the crossroads she takes her stand.

verses.esv: beside the gates in front of the town, at the entrance of the portals she cries aloud:
verses.kjv: She crieth at the gates, at the entry of the city, at the coming in at the doors.
verses.bsb: Beside the gates to the city, at the entrances she cries out:

verses.esv: “To you, O men, I call, and my cry is to the children of man.
verses.kjv: Unto you, O men, I call; and my voice is to the sons of man.
verses.bsb: “To you, O men, I call out, and my cry is to the sons of men.

verses.esv: O simple ones, learn prudence; O fools, learn sense.
verses.kjv: O ye simple, understand wisdom: and, ye fools, be ye of an understanding heart.
verses.bsb: O simple ones, learn to be shrewd; O fools, gain understanding.

verses.esv: Hear, for I will speak noble things, and from my lips will come what is right,
verses.kjv: Hear; for I will speak of excellent things; and the opening of my lips shall be right things.
verses.bsb: Listen, for I speak of noble things, and the opening of my lips will reveal right.

verses.esv: for my mouth will utter truth; wickedness is an abomination to my lips.
verses.kjv: For my mouth shall speak truth; and wickedness is an abomination to my lips.
verses.bsb: For my mouth will speak the truth, and wickedness is detestable to my lips.

verses.esv: All the words of my mouth are righteous; there is nothing twisted or crooked in them.
verses.kjv: All the words of my mouth are in righteousness; there is nothing froward or perverse in them.
verses.bsb: All the words of my mouth are righteous; none are crooked or perverse.

verses.esv: They are all straight to him who understands, and right to those who find knowledge.
verses.kjv: They are all plain to him that understandeth, and right to them that find knowledge.
verses.bsb: They are all plain to the discerning, and upright to those who find knowledge.

verses.esv: Take my instruction instead of silver, and knowledge rather than choice gold,
verses.kjv: Receive my instruction, and not silver; and knowledge rather than choice gold.
verses.bsb: Receive my instruction instead of silver, and knowledge rather than pure gold.

verses.esv: for wisdom is better than jewels, and all that you may desire cannot compare with her.
verses.kjv: For wisdom is better than rubies; and all the things that may be desired are not to be compared to it.
verses.bsb: For wisdom is more precious than rubies, and nothing you desire compares with her.

verses.esv: “I, wisdom, dwell with prudence, and I find knowledge and discretion.
verses.kjv: I wisdom dwell with prudence, and find out knowledge of witty inventions.
verses.bsb: I, wisdom, dwell together with prudence, and I find knowledge and discretion.

verses.esv: The fear of the LORD is hatred of evil. Pride and arrogance and the way of evil and perverted speech I hate.
verses.kjv: The fear of the Lord is to hate evil: pride, and arrogancy, and the evil way, and the froward mouth, do I hate.
verses.bsb: To fear the LORD is to hate evil; I hate arrogant pride, evil conduct, and perverse speech.

verses.esv: I have counsel and sound wisdom; I have insight; I have strength.
verses.kjv: Counsel is mine, and sound wisdom: I am understanding; I have strength.
verses.bsb: Counsel and sound judgment are mine; I have insight and strength.

verses.esv: By me kings reign, and rulers decree what is just;
verses.kjv: By me kings reign, and princes decree justice.
verses.bsb: By me kings reign, and rulers enact just laws;

verses.esv: by me princes rule, and nobles, all who govern justly.
verses.kjv: By me princes rule, and nobles, even all the judges of the earth.
verses.bsb: By me princes rule, and all nobles who govern justly.

verses.esv: I love those who love me, and those who seek me diligently find me.
verses.kjv: I love them that love me; and those that seek me early shall find me.
verses.bsb: I love those who love me, and those who seek me early shall find me.

verses.esv: Riches and honor are with me, enduring wealth and righteousness.
verses.kjv: Riches and honour are with me; yea, durable riches and righteousness.
verses.bsb: With me are riches and honor, enduring wealth and righteousness.

verses.esv: My fruit is better than gold, even fine gold, and my yield than choice silver.
verses.kjv: My fruit is better than gold, yea, than fine gold; and my revenue than choice silver.
verses.bsb: My fruit is better than gold, pure gold, and my harvest surpasses choice silver.

verses.esv: I walk in the way of righteousness, in the paths of justice,
verses.kjv: I lead in the way of righteousness, in the midst of the paths of judgment:
verses.bsb: I walk in the way of righteousness, along the paths of justice,

verses.esv: granting an inheritance to those who love me, and filling their treasuries.
verses.kjv: That I may cause those that love me to inherit substance; and I will fill their treasures.
verses.bsb: bestowing wealth on those who love me and making their treasuries full.

verses.esv: “The LORD possessed me at the beginning of his work, the first of his acts of old.
verses.kjv: The Lord possessed me in the beginning of his way, before his works of old.
verses.bsb: The LORD created me as His first course, before His works of old.

verses.esv: Ages ago I was set up, at the first, before the beginning of the earth.
verses.kjv: I was set up from everlasting, from the beginning, or ever the earth was.
verses.bsb: From everlasting I was established, from the beginning, before the earth began.

verses.esv: When there were no depths I was brought forth, when there were no springs abounding with water.
verses.kjv: When there were no depths, I was brought forth; when there were no fountains abounding with water.
verses.bsb: When there were no watery depths, I was brought forth, when no springs were overflowing with water.

verses.esv: Before the mountains had been shaped, before the hills, I was brought forth,
verses.kjv: Before the mountains were settled, before the hills was I brought forth:
verses.bsb: Before the mountains were settled, before the hills, I was brought forth,

verses.esv: before he had made the earth with its fields, or the first of the dust of the world.
verses.kjv: While as yet he had not made the earth, nor the fields, nor the highest part of the dust of the world.
verses.bsb: before He made the land or fields, or any of the dust of the earth.

verses.esv: When he established the heavens, I was there; when he drew a circle on the face of the deep,
verses.kjv: When he prepared the heavens, I was there: when he set a compass upon the face of the depth:
verses.bsb: I was there when He established the heavens, when He inscribed a circle on the face of the deep,

verses.esv: when he made firm the skies above, when he established the fountains of the deep,
verses.kjv: When he established the clouds above: when he strengthened the fountains of the deep:
verses.bsb: when He established the clouds above, when the fountains of the deep gushed forth,

verses.esv: when he assigned to the sea its limit, so that the waters might not transgress his command, when he marked out the foundations of the earth,
verses.kjv: When he gave to the sea his decree, that the waters should not pass his commandment: when he appointed the foundations of the earth:
verses.bsb: when He set a boundary for the sea, so that the waters would not surpass His command, when He marked out the foundations of the earth.

verses.esv: then I was beside him, like a master workman, and I was daily his delight, rejoicing before him always,
verses.kjv: Then I was by him, as one brought up with him: and I was daily his delight, rejoicing always before him;
verses.bsb: Then I was a skilled craftsman at His side, and His delight day by day, rejoicing always in His presence.

verses.esv: rejoicing in his inhabited world and delighting in the children of man.
verses.kjv: Rejoicing in the habitable part of his earth; and my delights were with the sons of men.
verses.bsb: I was rejoicing in His whole world, delighting together in the sons of men.

verses.esv: “And now, O sons, listen to me: blessed are those who keep my ways.
verses.kjv: Now therefore hearken unto me, O ye children: for blessed are they that keep my ways.
verses.bsb: Now therefore, my sons, listen to me, for blessed are those who keep my ways.

verses.esv: Hear instruction and be wise, and do not neglect it.
verses.kjv: Hear instruction, and be wise, and refuse it not.
verses.bsb: Listen to instruction and be wise; do not ignore it.

verses.esv: Blessed is the one who listens to me, watching daily at my gates, waiting beside my doors.
verses.kjv: Blessed is the man that heareth me, watching daily at my gates, waiting at the posts of my doors.
verses.bsb: Blessed is the man who listens to me, watching daily at my doors, waiting at the posts of my doorway.

verses.esv: For whoever finds me finds life and obtains favor from the LORD,
verses.kjv: For whoso findeth me findeth life, and shall obtain favour of the Lord.
verses.bsb: For whoever finds me finds life and obtains the favor of the LORD.

verses.esv: but he who fails to find me injures himself; all who hate me love death.”
verses.kjv: But he that sinneth against me wrongeth his own soul: all they that hate me love death.
verses.bsb: But he who fails to find me harms himself; all who hate me love death.”

verses.esv: Wisdom has built her house; she has hewn her seven pillars.
verses.kjv: WISDOM hath builded her house, she hath hewn out her seven pillars:
verses.bsb: Wisdom has built her house; she has carved out her seven pillars.

verses.esv: She has slaughtered her beasts; she has mixed her wine; she has also set her table.
verses.kjv: She hath killed her beasts; she hath mingled her wine; she hath also furnished her table.
verses.bsb: She has prepared her meat and mixed her wine; she has also set her table.

verses.esv: She has sent out her young women to call from the highest places in the town,
verses.kjv: She hath sent forth her maidens: she crieth upon the highest places of the city,
verses.bsb: She has sent out her maidservants; she calls out from the heights of the city.

verses.esv: “Whoever is simple, let him turn in here!” To him who lacks sense she says,
verses.kjv: Whoso is simple, let him turn in hither: as for him that wanteth understanding, she saith to him,
verses.bsb: “Whoever is simple, let him turn in here!” she says to him who lacks judgment.

verses.esv: “Come, eat of my bread and drink of the wine I have mixed.
verses.kjv: Come, eat of my bread, and drink of the wine which I have mingled.
verses.bsb: “Come, eat my bread and drink the wine I have mixed.

verses.esv: Leave your simple ways, and live, and walk in the way of insight.”
verses.kjv: Forsake the foolish, and live; and go in the way of understanding.
verses.bsb: Leave your folly behind, and you will live; walk in the way of understanding.”

verses.esv: Whoever corrects a scoffer gets himself abuse, and he who reproves a wicked man incurs injury.
verses.kjv: He that reproveth a scorner getteth to himself shame: and he that rebuketh a wicked man getteth himself a blot.
verses.bsb: He who corrects a mocker brings shame on himself; he who rebukes a wicked man taints himself.

verses.esv: Do not reprove a scoffer, or he will hate you; reprove a wise man, and he will love you.
verses.kjv: Reprove not a scorner, lest he hate thee: rebuke a wise man, and he will love thee.
verses.bsb: Do not rebuke a mocker, or he will hate you; rebuke a wise man, and he will love you.

verses.esv: Give instruction to a wise man, and he will be still wiser; teach a righteous man, and he will increase in learning.
verses.kjv: Give instruction to a wise man, and he will be yet wiser: teach a just man, and he will increase in learning.
verses.bsb: Instruct a wise man, and he will be wiser still; teach a righteous man, and he will increase his learning.

verses.esv: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom, and the knowledge of the Holy One is insight.
verses.kjv: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom: and the knowledge of the holy is understanding.
verses.bsb: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom, and knowledge of the Holy One is understanding.

verses.esv: For by me your days will be multiplied, and years will be added to your life.
verses.kjv: For by me thy days shall be multiplied, and the years of thy life shall be increased.
verses.bsb: For through wisdom your days will be multiplied, and years will be added to your life.

verses.esv: If you are wise, you are wise for yourself; if you scoff, you alone will bear it.
verses.kjv: If thou be wise, thou shalt be wise for thyself: but if thou scornest, thou alone shalt bear it.
verses.bsb: If you are wise, you are wise to your own advantage; but if you scoff, you alone will bear the consequences.

verses.esv: The woman Folly is loud; she is seductive and knows nothing.
verses.kjv: ¶ A foolish woman is clamorous: she is simple, and knoweth nothing.
verses.bsb: The woman named Folly is loud; she is naive and knows nothing.

verses.esv: She sits at the door of her house; she takes a seat on the highest places of the town,
verses.kjv: For she sitteth at the door of her house, on a seat in the high places of the city,
verses.bsb: She sits at the door of her house, on a seat in the heights of the city,

verses.esv: calling to those who pass by, who are going straight on their way,
verses.kjv: To call passengers who go right on their ways:
verses.bsb: calling out to those who pass by, who make their paths straight.

verses.esv: “Whoever is simple, let him turn in here!” And to him who lacks sense she says,
verses.kjv: Whoso is simple, let him turn in hither: and as for him that wanteth understanding, she saith to him,
verses.bsb: “Whoever is simple, let him turn in here!” she says to him who lacks judgment.

verses.esv: “Stolen water is sweet, and bread eaten in secret is pleasant.”
verses.kjv: Stolen waters are sweet, and bread eaten in secret is pleasant.
verses.bsb: “Stolen water is sweet, and bread eaten in secret is tasty!”

verses.esv: But he does not know that the dead are there, that her guests are in the depths of Sheol.
verses.kjv: But he knoweth not that the dead are there; and that her guests are in the depths of hell.
verses.bsb: But they do not know that the dead are there, that her guests are in the depths of Sheol.

verses.esv: The proverbs of Solomon. A wise son makes a glad father, but a foolish son is a sorrow to his mother.
verses.kjv: THE proverbs of Solomon. A wise son maketh a glad father: but a foolish son is the heaviness of his mother.
verses.bsb: The proverbs of Solomon:  A wise son brings joy to his father, but a foolish son grief to his mother.

verses.esv: Treasures gained by wickedness do not profit, but righteousness delivers from death.
verses.kjv: Treasures of wickedness profit nothing: but righteousness delivereth from death.
verses.bsb: Ill-gotten treasures profit nothing, but righteousness brings deliverance from death.

verses.esv: The LORD does not let the righteous go hungry, but he thwarts the craving of the wicked.
verses.kjv: The Lord will not suffer the soul of the righteous to famish: but he casteth away the substance of the wicked.
verses.bsb: The LORD does not let the righteous go hungry, but He denies the craving of the wicked.

verses.esv: A slack hand causes poverty, but the hand of the diligent makes rich.
verses.kjv: He becometh poor that dealeth with a slack hand: but the hand of the diligent maketh rich.
verses.bsb: Idle hands make one poor, but diligent hands bring wealth.

verses.esv: He who gathers in summer is a prudent son, but he who sleeps in harvest is a son who brings shame.
verses.kjv: He that gathereth in summer is a wise son: but he that sleepeth in harvest is a son that causeth shame.
verses.bsb: He who gathers in summer is a wise son, but he who sleeps during harvest is a disgraceful son.

verses.esv: Blessings are on the head of the righteous, but the mouth of the wicked conceals violence.
verses.kjv: Blessings are upon the head of the just: but violence covereth the mouth of the wicked.
verses.bsb: Blessings are on the head of the righteous, but the mouth of the wicked conceals violence.

verses.esv: The memory of the righteous is a blessing, but the name of the wicked will rot.
verses.kjv: The memory of the just is blessed: but the name of the wicked shall rot.
verses.bsb: The memory of the righteous is a blessing, but the name of the wicked will rot.

verses.esv: The wise of heart will receive commandments, but a babbling fool will come to ruin.
verses.kjv: The wise in heart will receive commandments: but a prating fool shall fall.
verses.bsb: A wise heart will receive commandments, but foolish lips will come to ruin.

verses.esv: Whoever walks in integrity walks securely, but he who makes his ways crooked will be found out.
verses.kjv: He that walketh uprightly walketh surely: but he that perverteth his ways shall be known.
verses.bsb: He who walks in integrity walks securely, but he who perverts his ways will be found out.

verses.esv: Whoever winks the eye causes trouble, and a babbling fool will come to ruin.
verses.kjv: He that winketh with the eye causeth sorrow: but a prating fool shall fall.
verses.bsb: He who winks the eye causes grief, and foolish lips will come to ruin.

verses.esv: The mouth of the righteous is a fountain of life, but the mouth of the wicked conceals violence.
verses.kjv: The mouth of a righteous man is a well of life: but violence covereth the mouth of the wicked.
verses.bsb: The mouth of the righteous is a fountain of life, but the mouth of the wicked conceals violence.

verses.esv: Hatred stirs up strife, but love covers all offenses.
verses.kjv: Hatred stirreth up strifes: but love covereth all sins.
verses.bsb: Hatred stirs up dissension, but love covers all transgressions.

verses.esv: On the lips of him who has understanding, wisdom is found, but a rod is for the back of him who lacks sense.
verses.kjv: In the lips of him that hath understanding wisdom is found: but a rod is for the back of him that is void of understanding.
verses.bsb: Wisdom is found on the lips of the discerning, but a rod is for the back of him who lacks judgment.

verses.esv: The wise lay up knowledge, but the mouth of a fool brings ruin near.
verses.kjv: Wise men lay up knowledge: but the mouth of the foolish is near destruction.
verses.bsb: The wise store up knowledge, but the mouth of the fool invites destruction.

verses.esv: A rich man's wealth is his strong city; the poverty of the poor is their ruin.
verses.kjv: The rich man’s wealth is his strong city: the destruction of the poor is their poverty.
verses.bsb: The wealth of the rich man is his fortified city, but poverty is the ruin of the poor.

verses.esv: The wage of the righteous leads to life, the gain of the wicked to sin.
verses.kjv: The labour of the righteous tendeth to life: the fruit of the wicked to sin.
verses.bsb: The labor of the righteous leads to life, but the gain of the wicked brings punishment.

verses.esv: Whoever heeds instruction is on the path to life, but he who rejects reproof leads others astray.
verses.kjv: He is in the way of life that keepeth instruction: but he that refuseth reproof erreth.
verses.bsb: Whoever heeds instruction is on the path to life, but he who ignores reproof goes astray.

verses.esv: The one who conceals hatred has lying lips, and whoever utters slander is a fool.
verses.kjv: He that hideth hatred with lying lips, and he that uttereth a slander, is a fool.
verses.bsb: The one who conceals hatred has lying lips, and whoever spreads slander is a fool.

verses.esv: When words are many, transgression is not lacking, but whoever restrains his lips is prudent.
verses.kjv: In the multitude of words there wanteth not sin: but he that refraineth his lips is wise.
verses.bsb: When words are many, sin is unavoidable, but he who restrains his lips is wise.

verses.esv: The tongue of the righteous is choice silver; the heart of the wicked is of little worth.
verses.kjv: The tongue of the just is as choice silver: the heart of the wicked is little worth.
verses.bsb: The tongue of the righteous is choice silver, but the heart of the wicked has little worth.

verses.esv: The lips of the righteous feed many, but fools die for lack of sense.
verses.kjv: The lips of the righteous feed many: but fools die for want of wisdom.
verses.bsb: The lips of the righteous feed many, but fools die for lack of judgment.

verses.esv: The blessing of the LORD makes rich, and he adds no sorrow with it.
verses.kjv: The blessing of the Lord, it maketh rich, and he addeth no sorrow with it.
verses.bsb: The blessing of the LORD enriches, and He adds no sorrow to it.

verses.esv: Doing wrong is like a joke to a fool, but wisdom is pleasure to a man of understanding.
verses.kjv: It is as sport to a fool to do mischief: but a man of understanding hath wisdom.
verses.bsb: The fool delights in shameful conduct, but a man of understanding has wisdom.

verses.esv: What the wicked dreads will come upon him, but the desire of the righteous will be granted.
verses.kjv: The fear of the wicked, it shall come upon him: but the desire of the righteous shall be granted.
verses.bsb: What the wicked man dreads will overtake him, but the desire of the righteous will be granted.

verses.esv: When the tempest passes, the wicked is no more, but the righteous is established forever.
verses.kjv: As the whirlwind passeth, so is the wicked no more: but the righteous is an everlasting foundation.
verses.bsb: When the whirlwind passes, the wicked are no more, but the righteous are secure forever.

verses.esv: Like vinegar to the teeth and smoke to the eyes, so is the sluggard to those who send him.
verses.kjv: As vinegar to the teeth, and as smoke to the eyes, so is the sluggard to them that send him.
verses.bsb: Like vinegar to the teeth and smoke to the eyes, so is the slacker to those who send him.

verses.esv: The fear of the LORD prolongs life, but the years of the wicked will be short.
verses.kjv: The fear of the Lord prolongeth days: but the years of the wicked shall be shortened.
verses.bsb: The fear of the LORD prolongs life, but the years of the wicked will be cut short.

verses.esv: The hope of the righteous brings joy, but the expectation of the wicked will perish.
verses.kjv: The hope of the righteous shall be gladness: but the expectation of the wicked shall perish.
verses.bsb: The hope of the righteous is joy, but the expectations of the wicked will perish.

verses.esv: The way of the LORD is a stronghold to the blameless, but destruction to evildoers.
verses.kjv: The way of the Lord is strength to the upright: but destruction shall be to the workers of iniquity.
verses.bsb: The way of the LORD is a refuge to the upright, but destruction awaits those who do evil.

verses.esv: The righteous will never be removed, but the wicked will not dwell in the land.
verses.kjv: The righteous shall never be removed: but the wicked shall not inhabit the earth.
verses.bsb: The righteous will never be shaken, but the wicked will not inhabit the land.

verses.esv: The mouth of the righteous brings forth wisdom, but the perverse tongue will be cut off.
verses.kjv: The mouth of the just bringeth forth wisdom: but the froward tongue shall be cut out.
verses.bsb: The mouth of the righteous brings forth wisdom, but a perverse tongue will be cut out.

verses.esv: The lips of the righteous know what is acceptable, but the mouth of the wicked, what is perverse. A false balance is an abomination to the LORD, but a just weight is his delight.
verses.kjv: The lips of the righteous know what is acceptable: but the mouth of the wicked speaketh frowardness.
verses.bsb: The lips of the righteous know what is fitting, but the mouth of the wicked is perverse.

verses.esv: When pride comes, then comes disgrace, but with the humble is wisdom.
verses.kjv: When pride cometh, then cometh shame: but with the lowly is wisdom.
verses.bsb: When pride comes, disgrace follows, but with humility comes wisdom.
