verses.esv: The integrity of the upright guides them, but the crookedness of the treacherous destroys them.
verses.kjv: The integrity of the upright shall guide them: but the perverseness of transgressors shall destroy them.
verses.bsb: The integrity of the upright guides them, but the perversity of the faithless destroys them.

verses.esv: Riches do not profit in the day of wrath, but righteousness delivers from death.
verses.kjv: Riches profit not in the day of wrath: but righteousness delivereth from death.
verses.bsb: Riches are worthless in the day of wrath, but righteousness brings deliverance from death.

verses.esv: The righteousness of the blameless keeps his way straight, but the wicked falls by his own wickedness.
verses.kjv: The righteousness of the perfect shall direct his way: but the wicked shall fall by his own wickedness.
verses.bsb: The righteousness of the blameless directs their path, but the wicked fall by their own wickedness.

verses.esv: The righteousness of the upright delivers them, but the treacherous are taken captive by their lust.
verses.kjv: The righteousness of the upright shall deliver them: but transgressors shall be taken in their own naughtiness.
verses.bsb: The righteousness of the upright delivers them, but the faithless are trapped by their own desires.

verses.esv: When the wicked dies, his hope will perish, and the expectation of wealth perishes too.
verses.kjv: When a wicked man dieth, his expectation shall perish: and the hope of unjust men perisheth.
verses.bsb: When the wicked man dies, his hope perishes, and the hope of his strength vanishes.

verses.esv: The righteous is delivered from trouble, and the wicked walks into it instead.
verses.kjv: The righteous is delivered out of trouble, and the wicked cometh in his stead.
verses.bsb: The righteous man is delivered from trouble; in his place the wicked man goes in.

verses.esv: With his mouth the godless man would destroy his neighbor, but by knowledge the righteous are delivered.
verses.kjv: An hypocrite with his mouth destroyeth his neighbour: but through knowledge shall the just be delivered.
verses.bsb: With his mouth the ungodly man destroys his neighbor, but through knowledge the righteous are rescued.

verses.esv: When it goes well with the righteous, the city rejoices, and when the wicked perish there are shouts of gladness.
verses.kjv: When it goeth well with the righteous, the city rejoiceth: and when the wicked perish, there is shouting.
verses.bsb: When the righteous thrive, the city rejoices, and when the wicked perish, there are shouts of joy.

verses.esv: By the blessing of the upright a city is exalted, but by the mouth of the wicked it is overthrown.
verses.kjv: By the blessing of the upright the city is exalted: but it is overthrown by the mouth of the wicked.
verses.bsb: By the blessing of the upright a city is built up, but by the mouth of the wicked it is torn down.

verses.esv: Whoever belittles his neighbor lacks sense, but a man of understanding remains silent.
verses.kjv: He that is void of wisdom despiseth his neighbour: but a man of understanding holdeth his peace.
verses.bsb: Whoever shows contempt for his neighbor lacks judgment, but a man of understanding remains silent.

verses.esv: Whoever goes about slandering reveals secrets, but he who is trustworthy in spirit keeps a thing covered.
verses.kjv: A talebearer revealeth secrets: but he that is of a faithful spirit concealeth the matter.
verses.bsb: A gossip reveals a secret, but a trustworthy person keeps a confidence.

verses.esv: Where there is no guidance, a people falls, but in an abundance of counselors there is safety.
verses.kjv: Where no counsel is, the people fall: but in the multitude of counsellers there is safety.
verses.bsb: For lack of guidance, a nation falls, but with many counselors comes deliverance.

verses.esv: Whoever puts up security for a stranger will surely suffer harm, but he who hates striking hands in pledge is secure.
verses.kjv: He that is surety for a stranger shall smart for it: and he that hateth suretiship is sure.
verses.bsb: He who puts up security for a stranger will surely suffer, but the one who hates indebtedness is secure.

verses.esv: A gracious woman gets honor, and violent men get riches.
verses.kjv: A gracious woman retaineth honour: and strong men retain riches.
verses.bsb: A gracious woman attains honor, but ruthless men gain only wealth.

verses.esv: A man who is kind benefits himself, but a cruel man hurts himself.
verses.kjv: The merciful man doeth good to his own soul: but he that is cruel troubleth his own flesh.
verses.bsb: A kind man benefits himself, but a cruel man brings trouble on himself.

verses.esv: The wicked earns deceptive wages, but one who sows righteousness gets a sure reward.
verses.kjv: The wicked worketh a deceitful work: but to him that soweth righteousness shall be a sure reward.
verses.bsb: The wicked man earns an empty wage, but he who sows righteousness reaps a true reward.

verses.esv: Whoever is steadfast in righteousness will live, but he who pursues evil will die.
verses.kjv: As righteousness tendeth to life: so he that pursueth evil pursueth it to his own death.
verses.bsb: Genuine righteousness leads to life, but the pursuit of evil brings death.

verses.esv: Those of crooked heart are an abomination to the LORD, but those of blameless ways are his delight.
verses.kjv: They that are of a froward heart are abomination to the Lord: but such as are upright in their way are his delight.
verses.bsb: The perverse in heart are an abomination to the LORD, but the blameless in their walk are His delight.

verses.esv: Be assured, an evil person will not go unpunished, but the offspring of the righteous will be delivered.
verses.kjv: Though hand join in hand, the wicked shall not be unpunished: but the seed of the righteous shall be delivered.
verses.bsb: Be assured that the wicked will not go unpunished, but the offspring of the righteous will escape.

verses.esv: Like a gold ring in a pig's snout is a beautiful woman without discretion.
verses.kjv: As a jewel of gold in a swine’s snout, so is a fair woman which is without discretion.
verses.bsb: Like a gold ring in a pig’s snout is a beautiful woman who lacks discretion.

verses.esv: The desire of the righteous ends only in good, the expectation of the wicked in wrath.
verses.kjv: The desire of the righteous is only good: but the expectation of the wicked is wrath.
verses.bsb: The desire of the righteous leads only to good, but the hope of the wicked brings wrath.

verses.esv: One gives freely, yet grows all the richer; another withholds what he should give, and only suffers want.
verses.kjv: There is that scattereth, and yet increaseth; and there is that withholdeth more than is meet, but it tendeth to poverty.
verses.bsb: One gives freely, yet gains even more; another withholds what is right, only to become poor.

verses.esv: Whoever brings blessing will be enriched, and one who waters will himself be watered.
verses.kjv: The liberal soul shall be made fat: and he that watereth shall be watered also himself.
verses.bsb: A generous soul will prosper, and he who refreshes others will himself be refreshed.

verses.esv: The people curse him who holds back grain, but a blessing is on the head of him who sells it.
verses.kjv: He that withholdeth corn, the people shall curse him: but blessing shall be upon the head of him that selleth it.
verses.bsb: The people will curse the hoarder of grain, but blessing will crown the one who sells it.

verses.esv: Whoever diligently seeks good seeks favor, but evil comes to him who searches for it.
verses.kjv: He that diligently seeketh good procureth favour: but he that seeketh mischief, it shall come unto him.
verses.bsb: He who searches out good finds favor, but evil will come to him who seeks it.

verses.esv: Whoever trusts in his riches will fall, but the righteous will flourish like a green leaf.
verses.kjv: He that trusteth in his riches shall fall: but the righteous shall flourish as a branch.
verses.bsb: He who trusts in his riches will fall, but the righteous will thrive like foliage.

verses.esv: Whoever troubles his own household will inherit the wind, and the fool will be servant to the wise of heart.
verses.kjv: He that troubleth his own house shall inherit the wind: and the fool shall be servant to the wise of heart.
verses.bsb: He who brings trouble on his house will inherit the wind, and the fool will be servant to the wise of heart.

verses.esv: The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life, and whoever captures souls is wise.
verses.kjv: The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life; and he that winneth souls is wise.
verses.bsb: The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life, and he who wins souls is wise.

verses.esv: If the righteous is repaid on earth, how much more the wicked and the sinner! Whoever loves discipline loves knowledge, but he who hates reproof is stupid.
verses.kjv: Behold, the righteous shall be recompensed in the earth: much more the wicked and the sinner.
verses.bsb: If the righteous receive their due on earth, how much more the ungodly and the sinner!

verses.esv: A good man obtains favor from the LORD, but a man of evil devices he condemns.
verses.kjv: A good man obtaineth favour of the Lord: but a man of wicked devices will he condemn.
verses.bsb: The good man obtains favor from the LORD, but the LORD condemns a man who devises evil.

verses.esv: No one is established by wickedness, but the root of the righteous will never be moved.
verses.kjv: A man shall not be established by wickedness: but the root of the righteous shall not be moved.
verses.bsb: A man cannot be established through wickedness, but the righteous cannot be uprooted.

verses.esv: An excellent wife is the crown of her husband, but she who brings shame is like rottenness in his bones.
verses.kjv: A virtuous woman is a crown to her husband: but she that maketh ashamed is as rottenness in his bones.
verses.bsb: A wife of noble character is her husband’s crown, but she who causes shame is like decay in his bones.

verses.esv: The thoughts of the righteous are just; the counsels of the wicked are deceitful.
verses.kjv: The thoughts of the righteous are right: but the counsels of the wicked are deceit.
verses.bsb: The plans of the righteous are just, but the counsel of the wicked leads to deceit.

verses.esv: The words of the wicked lie in wait for blood, but the mouth of the upright delivers them.
verses.kjv: The words of the wicked are to lie in wait for blood: but the mouth of the upright shall deliver them.
verses.bsb: The words of the wicked lie in wait for blood, but the speech of the upright rescues them.

verses.esv: The wicked are overthrown and are no more, but the house of the righteous will stand.
verses.kjv: The wicked are overthrown, and are not: but the house of the righteous shall stand.
verses.bsb: The wicked are overthrown and perish, but the house of the righteous will stand.

verses.esv: A man is commended according to his good sense, but one of twisted mind is despised.
verses.kjv: A man shall be commended according to his wisdom: but he that is of a perverse heart shall be despised.
verses.bsb: A man is praised according to his wisdom, but a twisted mind is despised.

verses.esv: Better to be lowly and have a servant than to play the great man and lack bread.
verses.kjv: He that is despised, and hath a servant, is better than he that honoureth himself, and lacketh bread.
verses.bsb: Better to be lightly esteemed yet have a servant, than to be self-important but lack food.

verses.esv: Whoever is righteous has regard for the life of his beast, but the mercy of the wicked is cruel.
verses.kjv: A righteous man regardeth the life of his beast: but the tender mercies of the wicked are cruel.
verses.bsb: A righteous man regards the life of his animal, but the tender mercies of the wicked are only cruelty.

verses.esv: Whoever works his land will have plenty of bread, but he who follows worthless pursuits lacks sense.
verses.kjv: He that tilleth his land shall be satisfied with bread: but he that followeth vain persons is void of understanding.
verses.bsb: The one who works his land will have plenty of food, but whoever chases fantasies lacks judgment.

verses.esv: Whoever is wicked covets the spoil of evildoers, but the root of the righteous bears fruit.
verses.kjv: The wicked desireth the net of evil men: but the root of the righteous yieldeth fruit.
verses.bsb: The wicked desire the plunder of evil men, but the root of the righteous flourishes.

verses.esv: An evil man is ensnared by the transgression of his lips, but the righteous escapes from trouble.
verses.kjv: The wicked is snared by the transgression of his lips: but the just shall come out of trouble.
verses.bsb: An evil man is trapped by his rebellious speech, but a righteous man escapes from trouble.

verses.esv: From the fruit of his mouth a man is satisfied with good, and the work of a man's hand comes back to him.
verses.kjv: A man shall be satisfied with good by the fruit of his mouth: and the recompence of a man’s hands shall be rendered unto him.
verses.bsb: By fruitful speech a man is filled with good things, and the work of his hands returns to him.

verses.esv: The way of a fool is right in his own eyes, but a wise man listens to advice.
verses.kjv: The way of a fool is right in his own eyes: but he that hearkeneth unto counsel is wise.
verses.bsb: The way of a fool is right in his own eyes, but a wise man listens to counsel.

verses.esv: The vexation of a fool is known at once, but the prudent ignores an insult.
verses.kjv: A fool’s wrath is presently known: but a prudent man covereth shame.
verses.bsb: A fool’s anger is known at once, but a prudent man overlooks an insult.

verses.esv: Whoever speaks the truth gives honest evidence, but a false witness utters deceit.
verses.kjv: He that speaketh truth sheweth forth righteousness: but a false witness deceit.
verses.bsb: He who speaks the truth declares what is right, but a false witness speaks deceit.

verses.esv: There is one whose rash words are like sword thrusts, but the tongue of the wise brings healing.
verses.kjv: There is that speaketh like the piercings of a sword: but the tongue of the wise is health.
verses.bsb: Speaking rashly is like a piercing sword, but the tongue of the wise brings healing.

verses.esv: Truthful lips endure forever, but a lying tongue is but for a moment.
verses.kjv: The lip of truth shall be established for ever: but a lying tongue is but for a moment.
verses.bsb: Truthful lips endure forever, but a lying tongue lasts only a moment.

verses.esv: Deceit is in the heart of those who devise evil, but those who plan peace have joy.
verses.kjv: Deceit is in the heart of them that imagine evil: but to the counsellers of peace is joy.
verses.bsb: Deceit is in the hearts of those who devise evil, but the counselors of peace have joy.

verses.esv: No ill befalls the righteous, but the wicked are filled with trouble.
verses.kjv: There shall no evil happen to the just: but the wicked shall be filled with mischief.
verses.bsb: No harm befalls the righteous, but the wicked are filled with trouble.

verses.esv: Lying lips are an abomination to the LORD, but those who act faithfully are his delight.
verses.kjv: Lying lips are abomination to the Lord: but they that deal truly are his delight.
verses.bsb: Lying lips are detestable to the LORD, but those who deal faithfully are His delight.

verses.esv: A prudent man conceals knowledge, but the heart of fools proclaims folly.
verses.kjv: A prudent man concealeth knowledge: but the heart of fools proclaimeth foolishness.
verses.bsb: A shrewd man keeps his knowledge to himself, but a foolish heart proclaims its folly.

verses.esv: The hand of the diligent will rule, while the slothful will be put to forced labor.
verses.kjv: The hand of the diligent shall bear rule: but the slothful shall be under tribute.
verses.bsb: The hand of the diligent will rule, but laziness ends in forced labor.

verses.esv: Anxiety in a man's heart weighs him down, but a good word makes him glad.
verses.kjv: Heaviness in the heart of man maketh it stoop: but a good word maketh it glad.
verses.bsb: Anxiety weighs down the heart of a man, but a good word cheers it up.

verses.esv: One who is righteous is a guide to his neighbor, but the way of the wicked leads them astray.
verses.kjv: The righteous is more excellent than his neighbour: but the way of the wicked seduceth them.
verses.bsb: A righteous man is cautious in friendship, but the ways of the wicked lead them astray.

verses.esv: Whoever is slothful will not roast his game, but the diligent man will get precious wealth.
verses.kjv: The slothful man roasteth not that which he took in hunting: but the substance of a diligent man is precious.
verses.bsb: A lazy man does not roast his game, but a diligent man prizes his possession.

verses.esv: In the path of righteousness is life, and in its pathway there is no death. A wise son hears his father's instruction, but a scoffer does not listen to rebuke.
verses.kjv: In the way of righteousness is life; and in the pathway thereof there is no death.
verses.bsb: There is life in the path of righteousness, but another path leads to death.

verses.esv: From the fruit of his mouth a man eats what is good, but the desire of the treacherous is for violence.
verses.kjv: A man shall eat good by the fruit of his mouth: but the soul of the transgressors shall eat violence.
verses.bsb: From the fruit of his lips a man enjoys good things, but the desire of the faithless is violence.

verses.esv: Whoever guards his mouth preserves his life; he who opens wide his lips comes to ruin.
verses.kjv: He that keepeth his mouth keepeth his life: but he that openeth wide his lips shall have destruction.
verses.bsb: He who guards his mouth protects his life, but the one who opens his lips invites his own ruin.

verses.esv: The soul of the sluggard craves and gets nothing, while the soul of the diligent is richly supplied.
verses.kjv: The soul of the sluggard desireth, and hath nothing: but the soul of the diligent shall be made fat.
verses.bsb: The slacker craves yet has nothing, but the soul of the diligent is fully satisfied.

verses.esv: The righteous hates falsehood, but the wicked brings shame and disgrace.
verses.kjv: A righteous man hateth lying: but a wicked man is loathsome, and cometh to shame.
verses.bsb: The righteous hate falsehood, but the wicked bring shame and disgrace.

verses.esv: Righteousness guards him whose way is blameless, but sin overthrows the wicked.
verses.kjv: Righteousness keepeth him that is upright in the way: but wickedness overthroweth the sinner.
verses.bsb: Righteousness guards the man of integrity, but wickedness undermines the sinner.

verses.esv: One pretends to be rich, yet has nothing; another pretends to be poor, yet has great wealth.
verses.kjv: There is that maketh himself rich, yet hath nothing: there is that maketh himself poor, yet hath great riches.
verses.bsb: One pretends to be rich, but has nothing; another pretends to be poor, yet has great wealth.

verses.esv: The ransom of a man's life is his wealth, but a poor man hears no threat.
verses.kjv: The ransom of a man’s life are his riches: but the poor heareth not rebuke.
verses.bsb: Riches may ransom a man’s life, but a poor man hears no threat.

verses.esv: The light of the righteous rejoices, but the lamp of the wicked will be put out.
verses.kjv: The light of the righteous rejoiceth: but the lamp of the wicked shall be put out.
verses.bsb: The light of the righteous shines brightly, but the lamp of the wicked is extinguished.

verses.esv: By insolence comes nothing but strife, but with those who take advice is wisdom.
verses.kjv: Only by pride cometh contention: but with the well advised is wisdom.
verses.bsb: Arrogance leads only to strife, but wisdom is with the well-advised.

verses.esv: Wealth gained hastily will dwindle, but whoever gathers little by little will increase it.
verses.kjv: Wealth gotten by vanity shall be diminished: but he that gathereth by labour shall increase.
verses.bsb: Dishonest wealth will dwindle, but what is earned through hard work will be multiplied.

verses.esv: Hope deferred makes the heart sick, but a desire fulfilled is a tree of life.
verses.kjv: Hope deferred maketh the heart sick: but when the desire cometh, it is a tree of life.
verses.bsb: Hope deferred makes the heart sick, but desire fulfilled is a tree of life.

verses.esv: Whoever despises the word brings destruction on himself, but he who reveres the commandment will be rewarded.
verses.kjv: Whoso despiseth the word shall be destroyed: but he that feareth the commandment shall be rewarded.
verses.bsb: He who despises instruction will pay the penalty, but the one who respects a command will be rewarded.

verses.esv: The teaching of the wise is a fountain of life, that one may turn away from the snares of death.
verses.kjv: The law of the wise is a fountain of life, to depart from the snares of death.
verses.bsb: The teaching of the wise is a fountain of life, turning one from the snares of death.

verses.esv: Good sense wins favor, but the way of the treacherous is their ruin.
verses.kjv: Good understanding giveth favour: but the way of transgressors is hard.
verses.bsb: Good understanding wins favor, but the way of the faithless is difficult.

verses.esv: Every prudent man acts with knowledge, but a fool flaunts his folly.
verses.kjv: Every prudent man dealeth with knowledge: but a fool layeth open his folly.
verses.bsb: Every prudent man acts with knowledge, but a fool displays his folly.

verses.esv: A wicked messenger falls into trouble, but a faithful envoy brings healing.
verses.kjv: A wicked messenger falleth into mischief: but a faithful ambassador is health.
verses.bsb: A wicked messenger falls into trouble, but a faithful envoy brings healing.

verses.esv: Poverty and disgrace come to him who ignores instruction, but whoever heeds reproof is honored.
verses.kjv: Poverty and shame shall be to him that refuseth instruction: but he that regardeth reproof shall be honoured.
verses.bsb: Poverty and shame come to him who ignores discipline, but whoever heeds correction is honored.

verses.esv: A desire fulfilled is sweet to the soul, but to turn away from evil is an abomination to fools.
verses.kjv: The desire accomplished is sweet to the soul: but it is abomination to fools to depart from evil.
verses.bsb: Desire fulfilled is sweet to the soul, but turning from evil is detestable to fools.

verses.esv: Whoever walks with the wise becomes wise, but the companion of fools will suffer harm.
verses.kjv: He that walketh with wise men shall be wise: but a companion of fools shall be destroyed.
verses.bsb: He who walks with the wise will become wise, but the companion of fools will be destroyed.

verses.esv: Disaster pursues sinners, but the righteous are rewarded with good.
verses.kjv: Evil pursueth sinners: but to the righteous good shall be repayed.
verses.bsb: Disaster pursues sinners, but prosperity is the reward of the righteous.

verses.esv: A good man leaves an inheritance to his children's children, but the sinner's wealth is laid up for the righteous.
verses.kjv: A good man leaveth an inheritance to his children’s children: and the wealth of the sinner is laid up for the just.
verses.bsb: A good man leaves an inheritance to his children’s children, but the sinner’s wealth is passed to the righteous.

verses.esv: The fallow ground of the poor would yield much food, but it is swept away through injustice.
verses.kjv: Much food is in the tillage of the poor: but there is that is destroyed for want of judgment.
verses.bsb: Abundant food is in the fallow ground of the poor, but without justice it is swept away.

verses.esv: Whoever spares the rod hates his son, but he who loves him is diligent to discipline him.
verses.kjv: He that spareth his rod hateth his son: but he that loveth him chasteneth him betimes.
verses.bsb: He who spares the rod hates his son, but he who loves him disciplines him diligently.

verses.esv: The righteous has enough to satisfy his appetite, but the belly of the wicked suffers want. The wisest of women builds her house, but folly with her own hands tears it down.
verses.kjv: The righteous eateth to the satisfying of his soul: but the belly of the wicked shall want.
verses.bsb: A righteous man eats to his heart’s content, but the stomach of the wicked is empty.

verses.esv: Whoever walks in uprightness fears the LORD, but he who is devious in his ways despises him.
verses.kjv: He that walketh in his uprightness feareth the Lord: but he that is perverse in his ways despiseth him.
verses.bsb: He who walks in uprightness fears the LORD, but the one who is devious in his ways despises Him.

verses.esv: By the mouth of a fool comes a rod for his back, but the lips of the wise will preserve them.
verses.kjv: In the mouth of the foolish is a rod of pride: but the lips of the wise shall preserve them.
verses.bsb: The proud speech of a fool brings a rod to his back, but the lips of the wise protect them.

verses.esv: Where there are no oxen, the manger is clean, but abundant crops come by the strength of the ox.
verses.kjv: Where no oxen are, the crib is clean: but much increase is by the strength of the ox.
verses.bsb: Where there are no oxen, the manger is empty, but an abundant harvest comes through the strength of the ox.

verses.esv: A faithful witness does not lie, but a false witness breathes out lies.
verses.kjv: A faithful witness will not lie: but a false witness will utter lies.
verses.bsb: An honest witness does not deceive, but a dishonest witness pours forth lies.

verses.esv: A scoffer seeks wisdom in vain, but knowledge is easy for a man of understanding.
verses.kjv: A scorner seeketh wisdom, and findeth it not: but knowledge is easy unto him that understandeth.
verses.bsb: A mocker seeks wisdom and finds none, but knowledge comes easily to the discerning.

verses.esv: Leave the presence of a fool, for there you do not meet words of knowledge.
verses.kjv: Go from the presence of a foolish man, when thou perceivest not in him the lips of knowledge.
verses.bsb: Stay away from a foolish man; you will gain no knowledge from his speech.

verses.esv: The wisdom of the prudent is to discern his way, but the folly of fools is deceiving.
verses.kjv: The wisdom of the prudent is to understand his way: but the folly of fools is deceit.
verses.bsb: The wisdom of the prudent is to discern his way, but the folly of fools deceives them.

verses.esv: Fools mock at the guilt offering, but the upright enjoy acceptance.
verses.kjv: Fools make a mock at sin: but among the righteous there is favour.
verses.bsb: Fools mock the making of amends, but goodwill is found among the upright.

verses.esv: The heart knows its own bitterness, and no stranger shares its joy.
verses.kjv: The heart knoweth his own bitterness; and a stranger doth not intermeddle with his joy.
verses.bsb: The heart knows its own bitterness, and no stranger shares in its joy.

verses.esv: The house of the wicked will be destroyed, but the tent of the upright will flourish.
verses.kjv: The house of the wicked shall be overthrown: but the tabernacle of the upright shall flourish.
verses.bsb: The house of the wicked will be destroyed, but the tent of the upright will flourish.

verses.esv: There is a way that seems right to a man, but its end is the way to death.
verses.kjv: There is a way which seemeth right unto a man, but the end thereof are the ways of death.
verses.bsb: There is a way that seems right to a man, but its end is the way of death.

verses.esv: Even in laughter the heart may ache, and the end of joy may be grief.
verses.kjv: Even in laughter the heart is sorrowful; and the end of that mirth is heaviness.
verses.bsb: Even in laughter the heart may ache, and joy may end in sorrow.

verses.esv: The backslider in heart will be filled with the fruit of his ways, and a good man will be filled with the fruit of his ways.
verses.kjv: The backslider in heart shall be filled with his own ways: and a good man shall be satisfied from himself.
verses.bsb: The backslider in heart receives the fill of his own ways, but a good man is rewarded for his ways.

verses.esv: The simple believes everything, but the prudent gives thought to his steps.
verses.kjv: The simple believeth every word: but the prudent man looketh well to his going.
verses.bsb: The simple man believes every word, but the prudent man watches his steps.

verses.esv: One who is wise is cautious and turns away from evil, but a fool is reckless and careless.
verses.kjv: A wise man feareth, and departeth from evil: but the fool rageth, and is confident.
verses.bsb: A wise man fears and turns from evil, but a fool is careless and reckless.

verses.esv: A man of quick temper acts foolishly, and a man of evil devices is hated.
verses.kjv: He that is soon angry dealeth foolishly: and a man of wicked devices is hated.
verses.bsb: A quick-tempered man acts foolishly, and a devious man is hated.

verses.esv: The simple inherit folly, but the prudent are crowned with knowledge.
verses.kjv: The simple inherit folly: but the prudent are crowned with knowledge.
verses.bsb: The simple inherit folly, but the prudent are crowned with knowledge.

verses.esv: The evil bow down before the good, the wicked at the gates of the righteous.
verses.kjv: The evil bow before the good; and the wicked at the gates of the righteous.
verses.bsb: The evil bow before the good, and the wicked at the gates of the righteous.

verses.esv: The poor is disliked even by his neighbor, but the rich has many friends.
verses.kjv: The poor is hated even of his own neighbour: but the rich hath many friends.
verses.bsb: The poor man is hated even by his neighbor, but many are those who love the rich.

verses.esv: Whoever despises his neighbor is a sinner, but blessed is he who is generous to the poor.
verses.kjv: He that despiseth his neighbour sinneth: but he that hath mercy on the poor, happy is he.
verses.bsb: He who despises his neighbor sins, but blessed is he who shows kindness to the poor.

verses.esv: Do they not go astray who devise evil? Those who devise good meet steadfast love and faithfulness.
verses.kjv: Do they not err that devise evil? but mercy and truth shall be to them that devise good.
verses.bsb: Do not those who contrive evil go astray? But those who plan goodness find loving devotion and faithfulness.

verses.esv: In all toil there is profit, but mere talk tends only to poverty.
verses.kjv: In all labour there is profit: but the talk of the lips tendeth only to penury.
verses.bsb: There is profit in all labor, but mere talk leads only to poverty.

verses.esv: The crown of the wise is their wealth, but the folly of fools brings folly.
verses.kjv: The crown of the wise is their riches: but the foolishness of fools is folly.
verses.bsb: The crown of the wise is their wealth, but the effort of fools is folly.

verses.esv: A truthful witness saves lives, but one who breathes out lies is deceitful.
verses.kjv: A true witness delivereth souls: but a deceitful witness speaketh lies.
verses.bsb: A truthful witness saves lives, but one who utters lies is deceitful.

verses.esv: In the fear of the LORD one has strong confidence, and his children will have a refuge.
verses.kjv: In the fear of the Lord is strong confidence: and his children shall have a place of refuge.
verses.bsb: He who fears the LORD is secure in confidence, and his children shall have a place of refuge.

verses.esv: The fear of the LORD is a fountain of life, that one may turn away from the snares of death.
verses.kjv: The fear of the Lord is a fountain of life, to depart from the snares of death.
verses.bsb: The fear of the LORD is a fountain of life, turning a man from the snares of death.

verses.esv: In a multitude of people is the glory of a king, but without people a prince is ruined.
verses.kjv: In the multitude of people is the king’s honour: but in the want of people is the destruction of the prince.
verses.bsb: A large population is a king’s splendor, but a lack of subjects is a prince’s ruin.

verses.esv: Whoever is slow to anger has great understanding, but he who has a hasty temper exalts folly.
verses.kjv: He that is slow to wrath is of great understanding: but he that is hasty of spirit exalteth folly.
verses.bsb: A patient man has great understanding, but a quick-tempered man promotes folly.

verses.esv: A tranquil heart gives life to the flesh, but envy makes the bones rot.
verses.kjv: A sound heart is the life of the flesh: but envy the rottenness of the bones.
verses.bsb: A tranquil heart is life to the body, but envy rots the bones.

verses.esv: Whoever oppresses a poor man insults his Maker, but he who is generous to the needy honors him.
verses.kjv: He that oppresseth the poor reproacheth his Maker: but he that honoureth him hath mercy on the poor.
verses.bsb: Whoever oppresses the poor taunts their Maker, but whoever is kind to the needy honors Him.

verses.esv: The wicked is overthrown through his evildoing, but the righteous finds refuge in his death.
verses.kjv: The wicked is driven away in his wickedness: but the righteous hath hope in his death.
verses.bsb: The wicked man is thrown down by his own sin, but the righteous man has a refuge even in death.

verses.esv: Wisdom rests in the heart of a man of understanding, but it makes itself known even in the midst of fools.
verses.kjv: Wisdom resteth in the heart of him that hath understanding: but that which is in the midst of fools is made known.
verses.bsb: Wisdom rests in the heart of the discerning; even among fools she is known.

verses.esv: Righteousness exalts a nation, but sin is a reproach to any people.
verses.kjv: Righteousness exalteth a nation: but sin is a reproach to any people.
verses.bsb: Righteousness exalts a nation, but sin is a disgrace to any people.

verses.esv: A servant who deals wisely has the king's favor, but his wrath falls on one who acts shamefully. A soft answer turns away wrath, but a harsh word stirs up anger.
verses.kjv: The king’s favour is toward a wise servant: but his wrath is against him that causeth shame.
verses.bsb: A king delights in a wise servant, but his anger falls on the shameful.

verses.esv: The tongue of the wise commends knowledge, but the mouths of fools pour out folly.
verses.kjv: The tongue of the wise useth knowledge aright: but the mouth of fools poureth out foolishness.
verses.bsb: The tongue of the wise commends knowledge, but the mouth of the fool spouts folly.

verses.esv: The eyes of the LORD are in every place, keeping watch on the evil and the good.
verses.kjv: The eyes of the Lord are in every place, beholding the evil and the good.
verses.bsb: The eyes of the LORD are in every place, observing the evil and the good.

verses.esv: A gentle tongue is a tree of life, but perverseness in it breaks the spirit.
verses.kjv: A wholesome tongue is a tree of life: but perverseness therein is a breach in the spirit.
verses.bsb: A soothing tongue is a tree of life, but a perverse tongue crushes the spirit.

verses.esv: A fool despises his father's instruction, but whoever heeds reproof is prudent.
verses.kjv: A fool despiseth his father’s instruction: but he that regardeth reproof is prudent.
verses.bsb: A fool rejects his father’s discipline, but whoever heeds correction is prudent.

verses.esv: In the house of the righteous there is much treasure, but trouble befalls the income of the wicked.
verses.kjv: In the house of the righteous is much treasure: but in the revenues of the wicked is trouble.
verses.bsb: The house of the righteous has great treasure, but the income of the wicked is trouble.

verses.esv: The lips of the wise spread knowledge; not so the hearts of fools.
verses.kjv: The lips of the wise disperse knowledge: but the heart of the foolish doeth not so.
verses.bsb: The lips of the wise spread knowledge, but not so the hearts of fools.

verses.esv: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination to the LORD, but the prayer of the upright is acceptable to him.
verses.kjv: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination to the Lord: but the prayer of the upright is his delight.
verses.bsb: The sacrifice of the wicked is detestable to the LORD, but the prayer of the upright is His delight.

verses.esv: The way of the wicked is an abomination to the LORD, but he loves him who pursues righteousness.
verses.kjv: The way of the wicked is an abomination unto the Lord: but he loveth him that followeth after righteousness.
verses.bsb: The LORD detests the way of the wicked, but He loves those who pursue righteousness.

verses.esv: There is severe discipline for him who forsakes the way; whoever hates reproof will die.
verses.kjv: Correction is grievous unto him that forsaketh the way: and he that hateth reproof shall die.
verses.bsb: Discipline is harsh for him who leaves the path; he who hates correction will die.

verses.esv: Sheol and Abaddon lie open before the LORD; how much more the hearts of the children of man!
verses.kjv: Hell and destruction are before the Lord: how much more then the hearts of the children of men?
verses.bsb: Sheol and Abaddon lie open before the LORD— how much more the hearts of men!

verses.esv: A scoffer does not like to be reproved; he will not go to the wise.
verses.kjv: A scorner loveth not one that reproveth him: neither will he go unto the wise.
verses.bsb: A mocker does not love to be reproved, nor will he consult the wise.

verses.esv: A glad heart makes a cheerful face, but by sorrow of heart the spirit is crushed.
verses.kjv: A merry heart maketh a cheerful countenance: but by sorrow of the heart the spirit is broken.
verses.bsb: A joyful heart makes a cheerful countenance, but sorrow of the heart crushes the spirit.

verses.esv: The heart of him who has understanding seeks knowledge, but the mouths of fools feed on folly.
verses.kjv: The heart of him that hath understanding seeketh knowledge: but the mouth of fools feedeth on foolishness.
verses.bsb: A discerning heart seeks knowledge, but the mouth of a fool feeds on folly.

verses.esv: All the days of the afflicted are evil, but the cheerful of heart has a continual feast.
verses.kjv: All the days of the afflicted are evil: but he that is of a merry heart hath a continual feast.
verses.bsb: All the days of the oppressed are bad, but a cheerful heart has a continual feast.

verses.esv: Better is a little with the fear of the LORD than great treasure and trouble with it.
verses.kjv: Better is little with the fear of the Lord than great treasure and trouble therewith.
verses.bsb: Better a little with the fear of the LORD than great treasure with turmoil.

verses.esv: Better is a dinner of herbs where love is than a fattened ox and hatred with it.
verses.kjv: Better is a dinner of herbs where love is, than a stalled ox and hatred therewith.
verses.bsb: Better a dish of vegetables where there is love than a fattened ox with hatred.

verses.esv: A hot-tempered man stirs up strife, but he who is slow to anger quiets contention.
verses.kjv: A wrathful man stirreth up strife: but he that is slow to anger appeaseth strife.
verses.bsb: A hot-tempered man stirs up strife, but he who is slow to anger calms dispute.

verses.esv: The way of a sluggard is like a hedge of thorns, but the path of the upright is a level highway.
verses.kjv: The way of the slothful man is as an hedge of thorns: but the way of the righteous is made plain.
verses.bsb: The way of the slacker is like a hedge of thorns, but the path of the upright is a highway.

verses.esv: A wise son makes a glad father, but a foolish man despises his mother.
verses.kjv: A wise son maketh a glad father: but a foolish man despiseth his mother.
verses.bsb: A wise son brings joy to his father, but a foolish man despises his mother.

verses.esv: Folly is a joy to him who lacks sense, but a man of understanding walks straight ahead.
verses.kjv: Folly is joy to him that is destitute of wisdom: but a man of understanding walketh uprightly.
verses.bsb: Folly is joy to one who lacks judgment, but a man of understanding walks a straight path.

verses.esv: Without counsel plans fail, but with many advisers they succeed.
verses.kjv: Without counsel purposes are disappointed: but in the multitude of counsellers they are established.
verses.bsb: Plans fail for lack of counsel, but with many advisers they succeed.

verses.esv: To make an apt answer is a joy to a man, and a word in season, how good it is!
verses.kjv: A man hath joy by the answer of his mouth: and a word spoken in due season, how good is it!
verses.bsb: A man takes joy in a fitting reply— and how good is a timely word!

verses.esv: The path of life leads upward for the prudent, that he may turn away from Sheol beneath.
verses.kjv: The way of life is above to the wise, that he may depart from hell beneath.
verses.bsb: The path of life leads upward for the wise, that he may avoid going down to Sheol.

verses.esv: The LORD tears down the house of the proud but maintains the widow's boundaries.
verses.kjv: The Lord will destroy the house of the proud: but he will establish the border of the widow.
verses.bsb: The LORD tears down the house of the proud, but He protects the boundaries of the widow.

verses.esv: The thoughts of the wicked are an abomination to the LORD, but gracious words are pure.
verses.kjv: The thoughts of the wicked are an abomination to the Lord: but the words of the pure are pleasant words.
verses.bsb: The LORD detests the thoughts of the wicked, but the words of the pure are pleasant to Him.

verses.esv: Whoever is greedy for unjust gain troubles his own household, but he who hates bribes will live.
verses.kjv: He that is greedy of gain troubleth his own house; but he that hateth gifts shall live.
verses.bsb: He who is greedy for unjust gain brings trouble on his household, but he who hates bribes will live.

verses.esv: The heart of the righteous ponders how to answer, but the mouth of the wicked pours out evil things.
verses.kjv: The heart of the righteous studieth to answer: but the mouth of the wicked poureth out evil things.
verses.bsb: The heart of the righteous ponders how to answer, but the mouth of the wicked blurts out evil.

verses.esv: The LORD is far from the wicked, but he hears the prayer of the righteous.
verses.kjv: The Lord is far from the wicked: but he heareth the prayer of the righteous.
verses.bsb: The LORD is far from the wicked, but He hears the prayer of the righteous.

verses.esv: The light of the eyes rejoices the heart, and good news refreshes the bones.
verses.kjv: The light of the eyes rejoiceth the heart: and a good report maketh the bones fat.
verses.bsb: The light of the eyes cheers the heart, and good news nourishes the bones.

verses.esv: The ear that listens to life-giving reproof will dwell among the wise.
verses.kjv: The ear that heareth the reproof of life abideth among the wise.
verses.bsb: He who listens to life-giving reproof will dwell among the wise.

verses.esv: Whoever ignores instruction despises himself, but he who listens to reproof gains intelligence.
verses.kjv: He that refuseth instruction despiseth his own soul: but he that heareth reproof getteth understanding.
verses.bsb: He who ignores discipline despises himself, but whoever heeds correction gains understanding.

verses.esv: The fear of the LORD is instruction in wisdom, and humility comes before honor. The plans of the heart belong to man, but the answer of the tongue is from the LORD.
verses.kjv: The fear of the Lord is the instruction of wisdom; and before honour is humility.
verses.bsb: The fear of the LORD is the instruction of wisdom, and humility comes before honor.

verses.esv: All the ways of a man are pure in his own eyes, but the LORD weighs the spirit.
verses.kjv: All the ways of a man are clean in his own eyes; but the Lord weigheth the spirits.
verses.bsb: All a man’s ways are pure in his own eyes, but his motives are weighed out by the LORD.

verses.esv: Commit your work to the LORD, and your plans will be established.
verses.kjv: Commit thy works unto the Lord, and thy thoughts shall be established.
verses.bsb: Commit your works to the LORD and your plans will be achieved.

verses.esv: The LORD has made everything for its purpose, even the wicked for the day of trouble.
verses.kjv: The Lord hath made all things for himself: yea, even the wicked for the day of evil.
verses.bsb: The LORD has made everything for His purpose— even the wicked for the day of disaster.

verses.esv: Everyone who is arrogant in heart is an abomination to the LORD; be assured, he will not go unpunished.
verses.kjv: Every one that is proud in heart is an abomination to the Lord: though hand join in hand, he shall not be unpunished.
verses.bsb: Everyone who is proud in heart is detestable to the LORD; be assured that he will not go unpunished.

verses.esv: By steadfast love and faithfulness iniquity is atoned for, and by the fear of the LORD one turns away from evil.
verses.kjv: By mercy and truth iniquity is purged: and by the fear of the Lord men depart from evil.
verses.bsb: By loving devotion and faithfulness iniquity is atoned for, and by the fear of the LORD one turns aside from evil.

verses.esv: When a man's ways please the LORD, he makes even his enemies to be at peace with him.
verses.kjv: When a man’s ways please the Lord, he maketh even his enemies to be at peace with him.
verses.bsb: When a man’s ways please the LORD, He makes even the man’s enemies live at peace with him.

verses.esv: Better is a little with righteousness than great revenues with injustice.
verses.kjv: Better is a little with righteousness than great revenues without right.
verses.bsb: Better a little with righteousness than great gain with injustice.

verses.esv: The heart of man plans his way, but the LORD establishes his steps.
verses.kjv: A man’s heart deviseth his way: but the Lord directeth his steps.
verses.bsb: A man’s heart plans his course, but the LORD determines his steps.

verses.esv: An oracle is on the lips of a king; his mouth does not sin in judgment.
verses.kjv: A divine sentence is in the lips of the king: his mouth transgresseth not in judgment.
verses.bsb: A divine verdict is on the lips of a king; his mouth must not betray justice.

verses.esv: A just balance and scales are the LORD's; all the weights in the bag are his work.
verses.kjv: A just weight and balance are the Lord’s: all the weights of the bag are his work.
verses.bsb: Honest scales and balances are from the LORD; all the weights in the bag are His concern.

verses.esv: It is an abomination to kings to do evil, for the throne is established by righteousness.
verses.kjv: It is an abomination to kings to commit wickedness: for the throne is established by righteousness.
verses.bsb: Wicked behavior is detestable to kings, for a throne is established through righteousness.

verses.esv: Righteous lips are the delight of a king, and he loves him who speaks what is right.
verses.kjv: Righteous lips are the delight of kings; and they love him that speaketh right.
verses.bsb: Righteous lips are a king’s delight, and he who speaks honestly is beloved.

verses.esv: A king's wrath is a messenger of death, and a wise man will appease it.
verses.kjv: The wrath of a king is as messengers of death: but a wise man will pacify it.
verses.bsb: The wrath of a king is a messenger of death, but a wise man will pacify it.

verses.esv: In the light of a king's face there is life, and his favor is like the clouds that bring the spring rain.
verses.kjv: In the light of the king’s countenance is life; and his favour is as a cloud of the latter rain.
verses.bsb: When a king’s face brightens, there is life; his favor is like a rain cloud in spring.

verses.esv: How much better to get wisdom than gold! To get understanding is to be chosen rather than silver.
verses.kjv: How much better is it to get wisdom than gold! and to get understanding rather to be chosen than silver!
verses.bsb: How much better to acquire wisdom than gold! To gain understanding is more desirable than silver.

verses.esv: The highway of the upright turns aside from evil; whoever guards his way preserves his life.
verses.kjv: The highway of the upright is to depart from evil: he that keepeth his way preserveth his soul.
verses.bsb: The highway of the upright leads away from evil; he who guards his way protects his life.

verses.esv: Pride goes before destruction, and a haughty spirit before a fall.
verses.kjv: Pride goeth before destruction, and an haughty spirit before a fall.
verses.bsb: Pride goes before destruction, and a haughty spirit before a fall.

verses.esv: It is better to be of a lowly spirit with the poor than to divide the spoil with the proud.
verses.kjv: Better it is to be of an humble spirit with the lowly, than to divide the spoil with the proud.
verses.bsb: It is better to be lowly in spirit among the humble than to divide the spoil with the proud.

verses.esv: Whoever gives thought to the word will discover good, and blessed is he who trusts in the LORD.
verses.kjv: He that handleth a matter wisely shall find good: and whoso trusteth in the Lord, happy is he.
verses.bsb: Whoever heeds instruction will find success, and blessed is he who trusts in the LORD.

verses.esv: The wise of heart is called discerning, and sweetness of speech increases persuasiveness.
verses.kjv: The wise in heart shall be called prudent: and the sweetness of the lips increaseth learning.
verses.bsb: The wise in heart are called discerning, and pleasant speech promotes instruction.

verses.esv: Good sense is a fountain of life to him who has it, but the instruction of fools is folly.
verses.kjv: Understanding is a wellspring of life unto him that hath it: but the instruction of fools is folly.
verses.bsb: Understanding is a fountain of life to its possessor, but the discipline of fools is folly.

verses.esv: The heart of the wise makes his speech judicious and adds persuasiveness to his lips.
verses.kjv: The heart of the wise teacheth his mouth, and addeth learning to his lips.
verses.bsb: The heart of the wise man instructs his mouth and adds persuasiveness to his lips.

verses.esv: Gracious words are like a honeycomb, sweetness to the soul and health to the body.
verses.kjv: Pleasant words are as an honeycomb, sweet to the soul, and health to the bones.
verses.bsb: Pleasant words are a honeycomb, sweet to the soul and healing to the bones.

verses.esv: There is a way that seems right to a man, but its end is the way to death.
verses.kjv: There is a way that seemeth right unto a man, but the end thereof are the ways of death.
verses.bsb: There is a way that seems right to a man, but its end is the way of death.

verses.esv: A worker's appetite works for him; his mouth urges him on.
verses.kjv: He that laboureth laboureth for himself; for his mouth craveth it of him.
verses.bsb: A worker’s appetite works for him because his hunger drives him onward.

verses.esv: A worthless man plots evil, and his speech is like a scorching fire.
verses.kjv: An ungodly man diggeth up evil: and in his lips there is as a burning fire.
verses.bsb: A worthless man digs up evil, and his speech is like a scorching fire.

verses.esv: A dishonest man spreads strife, and a whisperer separates close friends.
verses.kjv: A froward man soweth strife: and a whisperer separateth chief friends.
verses.bsb: A perverse man spreads dissension, and a gossip divides close friends.

verses.esv: A man of violence entices his neighbor and leads him in a way that is not good.
verses.kjv: A violent man enticeth his neighbour, and leadeth him into the way that is not good.
verses.bsb: A violent man entices his neighbor and leads him down a path that is not good.

verses.esv: Whoever winks his eyes plans dishonest things; he who purses his lips brings evil to pass.
verses.kjv: He shutteth his eyes to devise froward things: moving his lips he bringeth evil to pass.
verses.bsb: He who winks his eye devises perversity; he who purses his lips is bent on evil.

verses.esv: Gray hair is a crown of glory; it is gained in a righteous life.
verses.kjv: The hoary head is a crown of glory, if it be found in the way of righteousness.
verses.bsb: Gray hair is a crown of glory; it is attained along the path of righteousness.

verses.esv: Whoever is slow to anger is better than the mighty, and he who rules his spirit than he who takes a city.
verses.kjv: He that is slow to anger is better than the mighty; and he that ruleth his spirit than he that taketh a city.
verses.bsb: He who is slow to anger is better than a warrior, and he who controls his temper is greater than one who captures a city.

verses.esv: The lot is cast into the lap, but its every decision is from the LORD. Better is a dry morsel with quiet than a house full of feasting with strife.
verses.kjv: The lot is cast into the lap; but the whole disposing thereof is of the Lord.
verses.bsb: The lot is cast into the lap, but its every decision is from the LORD.

verses.esv: A servant who deals wisely will rule over a son who acts shamefully and will share the inheritance as one of the brothers.
verses.kjv: A wise servant shall have rule over a son that causeth shame, and shall have part of the inheritance among the brethren.
verses.bsb: A wise servant will rule over a disgraceful son and share his inheritance as one of the brothers.

verses.esv: The crucible is for silver, and the furnace is for gold, and the LORD tests hearts.
verses.kjv: The fining pot is for silver, and the furnace for gold: but the Lord trieth the hearts.
verses.bsb: A crucible for silver and a furnace for gold, but the LORD is the tester of hearts.

verses.esv: An evildoer listens to wicked lips, and a liar gives ear to a mischievous tongue.
verses.kjv: A wicked doer giveth heed to false lips; and a liar giveth ear to a naughty tongue.
verses.bsb: A wicked man listens to evil lips; a liar gives ear to a destructive tongue.

verses.esv: Whoever mocks the poor insults his Maker; he who is glad at calamity will not go unpunished.
verses.kjv: Whoso mocketh the poor reproacheth his Maker: and he that is glad at calamities shall not be unpunished.
verses.bsb: He who mocks the poor insults their Maker; whoever gloats over calamity will not go unpunished.

verses.esv: Grandchildren are the crown of the aged, and the glory of children is their fathers.
verses.kjv: Children’s children are the crown of old men; and the glory of children are their fathers.
verses.bsb: Grandchildren are the crown of the aged, and the glory of a son is his father.

verses.esv: Fine speech is not becoming to a fool; still less is false speech to a prince.
verses.kjv: Excellent speech becometh not a fool: much less do lying lips a prince.
verses.bsb: Eloquent words are unfit for a fool; how much worse are lying lips to a ruler!

verses.esv: A bribe is like a magic stone in the eyes of the one who gives it; wherever he turns he prospers.
verses.kjv: A gift is as a precious stone in the eyes of him that hath it: whithersoever it turneth, it prospereth.
verses.bsb: A bribe is a charm to its giver; wherever he turns, he succeeds.

verses.esv: Whoever covers an offense seeks love, but he who repeats a matter separates close friends.
verses.kjv: He that covereth a transgression seeketh love; but he that repeateth a matter separateth very friends.
verses.bsb: Whoever conceals an offense promotes love, but he who brings it up separates friends.

verses.esv: A rebuke goes deeper into a man of understanding than a hundred blows into a fool.
verses.kjv: A reproof entereth more into a wise man than an hundred stripes into a fool.
verses.bsb: A rebuke cuts into a man of discernment deeper than a hundred lashes cut into a fool.

verses.esv: An evil man seeks only rebellion, and a cruel messenger will be sent against him.
verses.kjv: An evil man seeketh only rebellion: therefore a cruel messenger shall be sent against him.
verses.bsb: An evil man seeks only rebellion; a cruel messenger will be sent against him.

verses.esv: Let a man meet a she-bear robbed of her cubs rather than a fool in his folly.
verses.kjv: Let a bear robbed of her whelps meet a man, rather than a fool in his folly.
verses.bsb: It is better to meet a bear robbed of her cubs than a fool in his folly.

verses.esv: If anyone returns evil for good, evil will not depart from his house.
verses.kjv: Whoso rewardeth evil for good, evil shall not depart from his house.
verses.bsb: If anyone returns evil for good, evil will never leave his house.

verses.esv: The beginning of strife is like letting out water, so quit before the quarrel breaks out.
verses.kjv: The beginning of strife is as when one letteth out water: therefore leave off contention, before it be meddled with.
verses.bsb: To start a quarrel is to release a flood; so abandon the dispute before it breaks out.

verses.esv: He who justifies the wicked and he who condemns the righteous are both alike an abomination to the LORD.
verses.kjv: He that justifieth the wicked, and he that condemneth the just, even they both are abomination to the Lord.
verses.bsb: Acquitting the guilty and condemning the righteous— both are detestable to the LORD.

verses.esv: Why should a fool have money in his hand to buy wisdom when he has no sense?
verses.kjv: Wherefore is there a price in the hand of a fool to get wisdom, seeing he hath no heart to it?
verses.bsb: Why should the fool have money in his hand with no intention of buying wisdom?

verses.esv: A friend loves at all times, and a brother is born for adversity.
verses.kjv: A friend loveth at all times, and a brother is born for adversity.
verses.bsb: A friend loves at all times, and a brother is born for adversity.

verses.esv: One who lacks sense gives a pledge and puts up security in the presence of his neighbor.
verses.kjv: A man void of understanding striketh hands, and becometh surety in the presence of his friend.
verses.bsb: A man lacking judgment strikes hands in pledge and puts up security for his neighbor.

verses.esv: Whoever loves transgression loves strife; he who makes his door high seeks destruction.
verses.kjv: He loveth transgression that loveth strife: and he that exalteth his gate seeketh destruction.
verses.bsb: He who loves transgression loves strife; he who builds his gate high invites destruction.

verses.esv: A man of crooked heart does not discover good, and one with a dishonest tongue falls into calamity.
verses.kjv: He that hath a froward heart findeth no good: and he that hath a perverse tongue falleth into mischief.
verses.bsb: The one with a perverse heart finds no good, and he whose tongue is deceitful falls into trouble.

verses.esv: He who sires a fool gets himself sorrow, and the father of a fool has no joy.
verses.kjv: He that begetteth a fool doeth it to his sorrow: and the father of a fool hath no joy.
verses.bsb: A man fathers a fool to his own grief; the father of a fool has no joy.

verses.esv: A joyful heart is good medicine, but a crushed spirit dries up the bones.
verses.kjv: A merry heart doeth good like a medicine: but a broken spirit drieth the bones.
verses.bsb: A joyful heart is good medicine, but a broken spirit dries up the bones.

verses.esv: The wicked accepts a bribe in secret to pervert the ways of justice.
verses.kjv: A wicked man taketh a gift out of the bosom to pervert the ways of judgment.
verses.bsb: A wicked man takes a covert bribe to subvert the course of justice.

verses.esv: The discerning sets his face toward wisdom, but the eyes of a fool are on the ends of the earth.
verses.kjv: Wisdom is before him that hath understanding; but the eyes of a fool are in the ends of the earth.
verses.bsb: Wisdom is the focus of the discerning, but the eyes of a fool wander to the ends of the earth.

verses.esv: A foolish son is a grief to his father and bitterness to her who bore him.
verses.kjv: A foolish son is a grief to his father, and bitterness to her that bare him.
verses.bsb: A foolish son brings grief to his father and bitterness to her who bore him.

verses.esv: To impose a fine on a righteous man is not good, nor to strike the noble for their uprightness.
verses.kjv: Also to punish the just is not good, nor to strike princes for equity.
verses.bsb: It is surely not good to punish the innocent or to flog a noble for his honesty.

verses.esv: Whoever restrains his words has knowledge, and he who has a cool spirit is a man of understanding.
verses.kjv: He that hath knowledge spareth his words: and a man of understanding is of an excellent spirit.
verses.bsb: A man of knowledge restrains his words, and a man of understanding maintains a calm spirit.

verses.esv: Even a fool who keeps silent is considered wise; when he closes his lips, he is deemed intelligent. Whoever isolates himself seeks his own desire; he breaks out against all sound judgment.
verses.kjv: Even a fool, when he holdeth his peace, is counted wise: and he that shutteth his lips is esteemed a man of understanding.
verses.bsb: Even a fool is considered wise if he keeps silent, and discerning when he holds his tongue.

verses.esv: A fool takes no pleasure in understanding, but only in expressing his opinion.
verses.kjv: A fool hath no delight in understanding, but that his heart may discover itself.
verses.bsb: A fool does not delight in understanding, but only in airing his opinions.

verses.esv: When wickedness comes, contempt comes also, and with dishonor comes disgrace.
verses.kjv: When the wicked cometh, then cometh also contempt, and with ignominy reproach.
verses.bsb: With a wicked man comes contempt as well, and shame is accompanied by disgrace.

verses.esv: The words of a man's mouth are deep waters; the fountain of wisdom is a bubbling brook.
verses.kjv: The words of a man’s mouth are as deep waters, and the wellspring of wisdom as a flowing brook.
verses.bsb: The words of a man’s mouth are deep waters; the fountain of wisdom is a bubbling brook.

verses.esv: It is not good to be partial to the wicked or to deprive the righteous of justice.
verses.kjv: It is not good to accept the person of the wicked, to overthrow the righteous in judgment.
verses.bsb: Showing partiality to the wicked is not good, nor is depriving the innocent of justice.

verses.esv: A fool's lips walk into a fight, and his mouth invites a beating.
verses.kjv: A fool’s lips enter into contention, and his mouth calleth for strokes.
verses.bsb: A fool’s lips bring him strife, and his mouth invites a beating.

verses.esv: A fool's mouth is his ruin, and his lips are a snare to his soul.
verses.kjv: A fool’s mouth is his destruction, and his lips are the snare of his soul.
verses.bsb: A fool’s mouth is his ruin, and his lips are a snare to his soul.

verses.esv: The words of a whisperer are like delicious morsels; they go down into the inner parts of the body.
verses.kjv: The words of a talebearer are as wounds, and they go down into the innermost parts of the belly.
verses.bsb: The words of a gossip are like choice morsels that go down into the inmost being.

verses.esv: Whoever is slack in his work is a brother to him who destroys.
verses.kjv: He also that is slothful in his work is brother to him that is a great waster.
verses.bsb: Whoever is slothful in his work is brother to him who destroys.

verses.esv: The name of the LORD is a strong tower; the righteous man runs into it and is safe.
verses.kjv: The name of the Lord is a strong tower: the righteous runneth into it, and is safe.
verses.bsb: The name of the LORD is a strong tower; the righteous run to it and are safe.

verses.esv: A rich man's wealth is his strong city, and like a high wall in his imagination.
verses.kjv: The rich man’s wealth is his strong city, and as an high wall in his own conceit.
verses.bsb: A rich man’s wealth is his fortified city; it is like a high wall in his imagination.

verses.esv: Before destruction a man's heart is haughty, but humility comes before honor.
verses.kjv: Before destruction the heart of man is haughty, and before honour is humility.
verses.bsb: Before his downfall a man’s heart is proud, but humility comes before honor.

verses.esv: If one gives an answer before he hears, it is his folly and shame.
verses.kjv: He that answereth a matter before he heareth it, it is folly and shame unto him.
verses.bsb: He who answers a matter before he hears it— this is folly and disgrace to him.

verses.esv: A man's spirit will endure sickness, but a crushed spirit who can bear?
verses.kjv: The spirit of a man will sustain his infirmity; but a wounded spirit who can bear?
verses.bsb: The spirit of a man can endure his sickness, but who can survive a broken spirit?

verses.esv: An intelligent heart acquires knowledge, and the ear of the wise seeks knowledge.
verses.kjv: The heart of the prudent getteth knowledge; and the ear of the wise seeketh knowledge.
verses.bsb: The heart of the discerning acquires knowledge, and the ear of the wise seeks it out.

verses.esv: A man's gift makes room for him and brings him before the great.
verses.kjv: A man’s gift maketh room for him, and bringeth him before great men.
verses.bsb: A man’s gift opens doors for him, and brings him before great men.

verses.esv: The one who states his case first seems right, until the other comes and examines him.
verses.kjv: He that is first in his own cause seemeth just; but his neighbour cometh and searcheth him.
verses.bsb: The first to state his case seems right until another comes and cross-examines him.

verses.esv: The lot puts an end to quarrels and decides between powerful contenders.
verses.kjv: The lot causeth contentions to cease, and parteth between the mighty.
verses.bsb: Casting the lot ends quarrels and separates strong opponents.

verses.esv: A brother offended is more unyielding than a strong city, and quarreling is like the bars of a castle.
verses.kjv: A brother offended is harder to be won than a strong city: and their contentions are like the bars of a castle.
verses.bsb: An offended brother is harder to win than a fortified city, and disputes are like the bars of a castle.

verses.esv: From the fruit of a man's mouth his stomach is satisfied; he is satisfied by the yield of his lips.
verses.kjv: A man’s belly shall be satisfied with the fruit of his mouth; and with the increase of his lips shall he be filled.
verses.bsb: From the fruit of his mouth a man’s belly is filled; with the harvest from his lips he is satisfied.

verses.esv: Death and life are in the power of the tongue, and those who love it will eat its fruits.
verses.kjv: Death and life are in the power of the tongue: and they that love it shall eat the fruit thereof.
verses.bsb: Life and death are in the power of the tongue, and those who love it will eat its fruit.

verses.esv: He who finds a wife finds a good thing and obtains favor from the LORD.
verses.kjv: Whoso findeth a wife findeth a good thing, and obtaineth favour of the Lord.
verses.bsb: He who finds a wife finds a good thing and obtains favor from the LORD.

verses.esv: The poor use entreaties, but the rich answer roughly.
verses.kjv: The poor useth intreaties; but the rich answereth roughly.
verses.bsb: The poor man pleads for mercy, but the rich man answers harshly.

verses.esv: A man of many companions may come to ruin, but there is a friend who sticks closer than a brother. Better is a poor person who walks in his integrity than one who is crooked in speech and is a fool.
verses.kjv: A man that hath friends must shew himself friendly: and there is a friend that sticketh closer than a brother.
verses.bsb: A man of many companions may come to ruin, but there is a friend who stays closer than a brother.

verses.esv: Desire without knowledge is not good, and whoever makes haste with his feet misses his way.
verses.kjv: Also, that the soul be without knowledge, it is not good; and he that hasteth with his feet sinneth.
verses.bsb: Even zeal is no good without knowledge, and he who hurries his footsteps misses the mark.

verses.esv: When a man's folly brings his way to ruin, his heart rages against the LORD.
verses.kjv: The foolishness of man perverteth his way: and his heart fretteth against the Lord.
verses.bsb: A man’s own folly subverts his way, yet his heart rages against the LORD.

verses.esv: Wealth brings many new friends, but a poor man is deserted by his friend.
verses.kjv: Wealth maketh many friends; but the poor is separated from his neighbour.
verses.bsb: Wealth attracts many friends, but a poor man is deserted by his friend.

verses.esv: A false witness will not go unpunished, and he who breathes out lies will not escape.
verses.kjv: A false witness shall not be unpunished, and he that speaketh lies shall not escape.
verses.bsb: A false witness will not go unpunished, and one who utters lies will not escape.

verses.esv: Many seek the favor of a generous man, and everyone is a friend to a man who gives gifts.
verses.kjv: Many will intreat the favour of the prince: and every man is a friend to him that giveth gifts.
verses.bsb: Many seek the favor of the prince, and everyone is a friend of the gift giver.

verses.esv: All a poor man's brothers hate him; how much more do his friends go far from him! He pursues them with words, but does not have them.
verses.kjv: All the brethren of the poor do hate him: how much more do his friends go far from him? he pursueth them with words, yet they are wanting to him.
verses.bsb: All the brothers of a poor man hate him— how much more do his friends avoid him! He may pursue them with pleading, but they are nowhere to be found.

verses.esv: Whoever gets sense loves his own soul; he who keeps understanding will discover good.
verses.kjv: He that getteth wisdom loveth his own soul: he that keepeth understanding shall find good.
verses.bsb: He who acquires wisdom loves himself; one who safeguards understanding will find success.

verses.esv: A false witness will not go unpunished, and he who breathes out lies will perish.
verses.kjv: A false witness shall not be unpunished, and he that speaketh lies shall perish.
verses.bsb: A false witness will not go unpunished, and one who pours out lies will perish.

verses.esv: It is not fitting for a fool to live in luxury, much less for a slave to rule over princes.
verses.kjv: Delight is not seemly for a fool; much less for a servant to have rule over princes.
verses.bsb: Luxury is unseemly for a fool— how much worse for a slave to rule over princes!

verses.esv: Good sense makes one slow to anger, and it is his glory to overlook an offense.
verses.kjv: The discretion of a man deferreth his anger; and it is his glory to pass over a transgression.
verses.bsb: A man’s insight gives him patience, and his virtue is to overlook an offense.

verses.esv: A king's wrath is like the growling of a lion, but his favor is like dew on the grass.
verses.kjv: The king’s wrath is as the roaring of a lion; but his favour is as dew upon the grass.
verses.bsb: A king’s rage is like the roar of a lion, but his favor is like dew on the grass.

verses.esv: A foolish son is ruin to his father, and a wife's quarreling is a continual dripping of rain.
verses.kjv: A foolish son is the calamity of his father: and the contentions of a wife are a continual dropping.
verses.bsb: A foolish son is his father’s ruin, and a quarrelsome wife is like a constant dripping.

verses.esv: House and wealth are inherited from fathers, but a prudent wife is from the LORD.
verses.kjv: House and riches are the inheritance of fathers: and a prudent wife is from the Lord.
verses.bsb: Houses and wealth are inherited from fathers, but a prudent wife is from the LORD.

verses.esv: Slothfulness casts into a deep sleep, and an idle person will suffer hunger.
verses.kjv: Slothfulness casteth into a deep sleep; and an idle soul shall suffer hunger.
verses.bsb: Laziness brings on deep sleep, and an idle soul will suffer hunger.

verses.esv: Whoever keeps the commandment keeps his life; he who despises his ways will die.
verses.kjv: He that keepeth the commandment keepeth his own soul; but he that despiseth his ways shall die.
verses.bsb: He who keeps a commandment preserves his soul, but he who is careless in his ways will die.

verses.esv: Whoever is generous to the poor lends to the LORD, and he will repay him for his deed.
verses.kjv: He that hath pity upon the poor lendeth unto the Lord; and that which he hath given will he pay him again.
verses.bsb: Kindness to the poor is a loan to the LORD, and He will repay the lender.

verses.esv: Discipline your son, for there is hope; do not set your heart on putting him to death.
verses.kjv: Chasten thy son while there is hope, and let not thy soul spare for his crying.
verses.bsb: Discipline your son, for in that there is hope; do not be party to his death.

verses.esv: A man of great wrath will pay the penalty, for if you deliver him, you will only have to do it again.
verses.kjv: A man of great wrath shall suffer punishment: for if thou deliver him, yet thou must do it again.
verses.bsb: A man of great anger must pay the penalty; if you rescue him, you will have to do so again.

verses.esv: Listen to advice and accept instruction, that you may gain wisdom in the future.
verses.kjv: Hear counsel, and receive instruction, that thou mayest be wise in thy latter end.
verses.bsb: Listen to counsel and accept discipline, that you may be wise the rest of your days.

verses.esv: Many are the plans in the mind of a man, but it is the purpose of the LORD that will stand.
verses.kjv: There are many devices in a man’s heart; nevertheless the counsel of the Lord, that shall stand.
verses.bsb: Many plans are in a man’s heart, but the purpose of the LORD will prevail.

verses.esv: What is desired in a man is steadfast love, and a poor man is better than a liar.
verses.kjv: The desire of a man is his kindness: and a poor man is better than a liar.
verses.bsb: The desire of a man is loving devotion; better to be poor than a liar.

verses.esv: The fear of the LORD leads to life, and whoever has it rests satisfied; he will not be visited by harm.
verses.kjv: The fear of the Lord tendeth to life: and he that hath it shall abide satisfied; he shall not be visited with evil.
verses.bsb: The fear of the LORD leads to life, that one may rest content, without visitation from harm.

verses.esv: The sluggard buries his hand in the dish and will not even bring it back to his mouth.
verses.kjv: A slothful man hideth his hand in his bosom, and will not so much as bring it to his mouth again.
verses.bsb: The slacker buries his hand in the dish; he will not even bring it back to his mouth.

verses.esv: Strike a scoffer, and the simple will learn prudence; reprove a man of understanding, and he will gain knowledge.
verses.kjv: Smite a scorner, and the simple will beware: and reprove one that hath understanding, and he will understand knowledge.
verses.bsb: Strike a mocker, and the simple will beware; rebuke the discerning man, and he will gain knowledge.

verses.esv: He who does violence to his father and chases away his mother is a son who brings shame and reproach.
verses.kjv: He that wasteth his father, and chaseth away his mother, is a son that causeth shame, and bringeth reproach.
verses.bsb: He who assaults his father or evicts his mother is a son who brings shame and disgrace.

verses.esv: Cease to hear instruction, my son, and you will stray from the words of knowledge.
verses.kjv: Cease, my son, to hear the instruction that causeth to err from the words of knowledge.
verses.bsb: If you cease to hear instruction, my son, you will stray from the words of knowledge.

verses.esv: A worthless witness mocks at justice, and the mouth of the wicked devours iniquity.
verses.kjv: An ungodly witness scorneth judgment: and the mouth of the wicked devoureth iniquity.
verses.bsb: A corrupt witness mocks justice, and a wicked mouth swallows iniquity.

verses.esv: Condemnation is ready for scoffers, and beating for the backs of fools. Wine is a mocker, strong drink a brawler, and whoever is led astray by it is not wise.
verses.kjv: Judgments are prepared for scorners, and stripes for the back of fools.
verses.bsb: Judgments are prepared for mockers, and beatings for the backs of fools.

verses.esv: The terror of a king is like the growling of a lion; whoever provokes him to anger forfeits his life.
verses.kjv: The fear of a king is as the roaring of a lion: whoso provoketh him to anger sinneth against his own soul.
verses.bsb: The terror of a king is like the roar of a lion; whoever provokes him forfeits his own life.

verses.esv: It is an honor for a man to keep aloof from strife, but every fool will be quarreling.
verses.kjv: It is an honour for a man to cease from strife: but every fool will be meddling.
verses.bsb: It is honorable for a man to resolve a dispute, but any fool will quarrel.

verses.esv: The sluggard does not plow in the autumn; he will seek at harvest and have nothing.
verses.kjv: The sluggard will not plow by reason of the cold; therefore shall he beg in harvest, and have nothing.
verses.bsb: The slacker does not plow in season; at harvest time he looks, but nothing is there.

verses.esv: The purpose in a man's heart is like deep water, but a man of understanding will draw it out.
verses.kjv: Counsel in the heart of man is like deep water; but a man of understanding will draw it out.
verses.bsb: The intentions of a man’s heart are deep waters, but a man of understanding draws them out.

verses.esv: Many a man proclaims his own steadfast love, but a faithful man who can find?
verses.kjv: Most men will proclaim every one his own goodness: but a faithful man who can find?
verses.bsb: Many a man proclaims his loving devotion, but who can find a trustworthy man?

verses.esv: The righteous who walks in his integrity— blessed are his children after him!
verses.kjv: The just man walketh in his integrity: his children are blessed after him.
verses.bsb: The righteous man walks with integrity; blessed are his children after him.

verses.esv: A king who sits on the throne of judgment winnows all evil with his eyes.
verses.kjv: A king that sitteth in the throne of judgment scattereth away all evil with his eyes.
verses.bsb: A king who sits on a throne to judge sifts out all evil with his eyes.

verses.esv: Who can say, “I have made my heart pure; I am clean from my sin”?
verses.kjv: Who can say, I have made my heart clean, I am pure from my sin?
verses.bsb: Who can say, “I have kept my heart pure; I am cleansed from my sin”?

verses.esv: Unequal weights and unequal measures are both alike an abomination to the LORD.
verses.kjv: Divers weights, and divers measures, both of them are alike abomination to the Lord.
verses.bsb: Differing weights and unequal measures— both are detestable to the LORD.

verses.esv: Even a child makes himself known by his acts, by whether his conduct is pure and upright.
verses.kjv: Even a child is known by his doings, whether his work be pure, and whether it be right.
verses.bsb: Even a young man is known by his actions— whether his conduct is pure and upright.

verses.esv: The hearing ear and the seeing eye, the LORD has made them both.
verses.kjv: The hearing ear, and the seeing eye, the Lord hath made even both of them.
verses.bsb: Ears that hear and eyes that see— the LORD has made them both.

verses.esv: Love not sleep, lest you come to poverty; open your eyes, and you will have plenty of bread.
verses.kjv: Love not sleep, lest thou come to poverty; open thine eyes, and thou shalt be satisfied with bread.
